title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 몇 시에 일어납니까?
나: 여섯 시에 일어납니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Chị dậy lúc mấy giờ?
B: Tôi dậy lúc sáu giờ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: What time do you get up?
B: I get up at six.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: A che ora ti alzi?
B: Mi alzo alle sei.

#######

A: What time do you get up?
B: I get up at six.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

B : Je me lève à six heures.

A: What time do you get up?
B: I get up at six.

B: Me levanto a las seis.

A: What time do you get up?
B: I get up at six.

B: Saya bangun jam enam.

B: I get up at six.

A: What time do you get up?
B: I get up at six.

B: Ich stehe um sechs auf.

A: What time do you get up?
B: I get up at six.

g_text_audio_translate.km:
A: តើអ្នកក្រោកពីម៉ោងប៉ុន្មាន?
ខ៖ ខ្ញុំក្រោកនៅម៉ោងប្រាំមួយ។

පිළිතුර: ඔබ නැගිටින්නේ කීයටද?
ආ: මම හයට නැගිටිනවා.

A: আপনি কখন উঠবেন?
বি: আমি ছয়টায় উঠি।

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 우리 가족은 모두 다섯 명입니다. 할머니, 아버지, 어머니, 언니 그리고 저입니다. 아빠만 남자이고 모두 여자입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Gia đình tôi có tất cả năm người. Có bà, bố, mẹ, chị gái và tôi. Chỉ có bố tôi là nam, còn lại đều là nữ.
g_text_audio_translate.en: There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Ci sono cinque persone nella mia famiglia. Ci sono nonna, padre, madre, sorella maggiore e io. Solo mio padre è maschio, il resto sono femmine.

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Il ya cinq personnes dans ma famille. Il y a grand-mère, père, mère, sœur aînée et moi. Seul mon père est un homme, les autres sont des femmes.

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hay cinco personas en mi familia. Hay abuela, padre, madre, hermana mayor y yo. Solo mi padre es hombre, el resto son mujeres.

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Ada lima orang dalam keluarga saya. Ada nenek, ayah, ibu, kakak perempuan dan saya. Hanya ayah saya laki-laki, selebihnya perempuan.

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
五人の家族がいます。祖母、父、母、姉、そして私がいます。父親だけが男性で、残りは女性です。

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Meine Familie besteht aus fünf Personen. Es gibt Großmutter, Vater, Mutter, ältere Schwester und mich. Nur mein Vater ist männlich, der Rest ist weiblich.

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我家一共五个人。有奶奶、爸爸、妈妈、姐姐和我。只有我爸是男的，其他都是女的。

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我家一共五個人。有奶奶、爸爸、媽媽、姐姐和我。只有我爸是男的，其他都是女的。

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Есть пять человек в моей семье. Есть бабушка, отец, мама, старшая сестра и я. Только мой отец мужчина, остальные женщины.

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ครอบครัวของฉันมีห้าคน มีคุณย่า พ่อ แม่ พี่สาว และฉัน มีเพียงพ่อของฉันเท่านั้นที่เป็นผู้ชาย ที่เหลือเป็นผู้หญิง

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Existem cinco pessoas na minha familia. Tem avó, pai, mãe, irmã mais velha e eu. Só meu pai é homem, o resto é mulher.

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
यहाँ परिवार में पाँच मैम्बर हैं। वहां दादी, पापा, मां, बड़ी बहन और मैं हूं. केवल मेरे पिता पुरुष हैं, बाकी सभी महिलाएँ हैं।

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Ailemde beş kişi var. Anneanne, baba, anne, abla ve ben varız. Sadece babam erkek, geri kalanlar kadın.

#######

There are five people in my family. There are grandmother, father, mother, older sister and me. Only my father is male, the rest are female.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मेरो परिवारमा पाँच जना छन् । हजुरआमा, बुवा, आमा, दिदी र म हुनुहुन्छ । मेरो बुबा मात्र पुरुष हुनुहुन्छ, बाँकी महिला हुनुहुन्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: មាន​មនុស្ស​ប្រាំ​នាក់​ក្នុង​គ្រួសារ​របស់​ខ្ញុំ។ មានជីដូន ឪពុក ម្តាយ បងស្រី និងខ្ញុំ។ មាន​តែ​ឪពុក​ខ្ញុំ​ជា​ប្រុស សល់​តែ​ស្រី។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මගේ පවුලේ පස් දෙනෙක් ඉන්නවා. ආච්චියි, තාත්තයි, අම්මයි, අක්කයි මමයි ඉන්නවා. මගේ පියා පමණක් පිරිමි, ඉතිරි අය ගැහැණු.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমার পরিবারে পাঁচজন। দাদী, বাবা, মা, বড় বোন আর আমি আছি। শুধু আমার বাবা পুরুষ, বাকিরা মহিলা।
g_text_audio_translate.my: ငါ့မိသားစုမှာ လူငါးယောက်ရှိတယ်။ အဖွား၊ အဖေ၊ အမေ၊ အစ်မနဲ့ ကျွန်တော်ရှိတယ်။ အဖေက ယောက်ျားပဲ၊ ကျန်တာက မိန်းမ။

나: 네. 부모님과 할머니, 할아버지하고 같이 살아요. 남동생도 있고요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Jisoo, do you live with your family?
B: Yes. I live with my parents, grandmother and grandfather. I also have a younger brother.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

B Sì. Vivo con i miei genitori, nonna e nonno. Ho anche un fratello minore.

g_text_audio_translate.pt:
R: Posso cortar o talo da maçã com uma tesoura?
B: Sim. Você tem que cortar o talo. E tome cuidado para não quebrar os galhos da macieira.

#######

A: Can I cut the apple stalk with scissors?
B: Yes. You have to cut the stalk short. And be careful not to break the branches of the apple tree.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: क्या मैं सेब के डंठल को कैंची से काट सकता हूँ?
बी: हाँ. आपको डंठल छोटा करना होगा. और सावधान रहो कि सेब के पेड़ की शाखाएँ न टूटें।

#######

A: Can I cut the apple stalk with scissors?
B: Yes. You have to cut the stalk short. And be careful not to break the branches of the apple tree.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Cevap: Elma sapını makasla kesebilir miyim?
B: Evet. Sapı kısa kesmeniz gerekiyor. Ve elma ağacının dallarını kırmamaya dikkat edin.

#######

A: Can I cut the apple stalk with scissors?
B: Yes. You have to cut the stalk short. And be careful not to break the branches of the apple tree.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: के म कैंचीले स्याउको डाँठ काट्न सक्छु?
B: हो। तपाईंले डाँठ छोटो काट्नु पर्छ। र स्याउको रूखको हाँगाहरू नतोड्न सावधान रहनुहोस्।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ចម្លើយ៖ តើខ្ញុំអាចកាត់ដើមផ្លែប៉ោមដោយកន្ត្រៃបានទេ?
ខ៖ បាទ។ អ្នកត្រូវកាត់ដើមឱ្យខ្លី។ ហើយត្រូវប្រយ័ត្នកុំឱ្យបែកមែករបស់មែកធាងផ្លែប៉ោម។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
A: මට කතුරෙන් ඇපල් ගෙඩිය කපා ගත හැකිද?
B: ඔව්. ඔබ ගොයම් ගහ කෙටියෙන් කපා ගත යුතුයි. තවද ඇපල් ගසේ අතු කැඩී නොයෑමට වගබලා ගන්න.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
A: আমি কি কাঁচি দিয়ে আপেলের ডাঁটা কাটতে পারি?
বি: হ্যাঁ। ডালপালা ছোট করে কাটতে হবে। আর খেয়াল রাখবেন আপেল গাছের ডাল যেন ভেঙ্গে না যায়।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
ဖြေ- ပန်းသီးအညှာကို ကတ်ကြေးနဲ့ ဖြတ်လို့ရလား။
B: ဟုတ်ကဲ့။ အညှာကို အတိုဖြတ်ရပါမယ်။ ပန်းသီးပင်၏ အကိုင်းအခက်များကို မချိုးမိစေရန် သတိထားပါ။

8 बजेको घडी देखाउने चित्र तस्वीर नम्बर 3 हो, त्यसैले सही उत्तर 3 हो।

8 ට ඔරලෝසුව පෙන්වන පින්තූරය පින්තූර අංක 3 වන බැවින් නිවැරදි පිළිතුර 3 වේ.

ঘড়ির কাঁটা 8 টার ছবি দেখায় ছবি নম্বর 3, তাই সঠিক উত্তর হল 3।

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

general.g_text_audio:

나: 이렇게 두 포기씩 노끈으로 묶으면 돼요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

B: Chị cột hai bắp lại với nhau bằng dây như thế này là được.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: How many cabbages should I bundle together?
B: You can bundle two cabbages together with string like this.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

B: Puoi impacchettare insieme due cavoli con uno spago come questo.

A: How many cabbages should I bundle together?

B : Vous pouvez regrouper deux choux avec une ficelle comme celle-ci.

A: How many cabbages should I bundle together?

B: Puedes agrupar dos coles con una cuerda como esta.

#######

A: How many cabbages should I bundle together?
B: You can bundle two cabbages together with string like this.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

#######

A: How many cabbages should I bundle together?
B: You can bundle two cabbages together with string like this.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

#######

A: How many cabbages should I bundle together?
B: You can bundle two cabbages together with string like this.

#######

A: How many cabbages should I bundle together?
B: You can bundle two cabbages together with string like this.

#######

A: How many cabbages should I bundle together?

B：你可以像這樣用繩子把兩個捲心菜捆在一起。

B: You can bundle two cabbages together with string like this.

#######

B: You can bundle two cabbages together with string like this.

बी: आप इस तरह से दो गोभी को एक साथ स्ट्रिंग के साथ बंडल कर सकते हैं।

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 어렸을 때부터 그림 그리는 것을 좋아했습니다. 요즘도 공원에 나가서 자주 그림을 그립니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Từ bé tôi đã thích vẽ tranh. Dạo này tôi cũng thường đi ra công viên để vẽ tranh.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Mi piaceva disegnare fin da piccolo. Anche in questi giorni vado spesso al parco e disegno.

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
J'ai aimé dessiner depuis que je suis jeune. Même ces jours-ci, je vais souvent au parc et je dessine.

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Me gustó dibujar desde que era joven. Incluso en estos días, a menudo voy al parque y dibujo.

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya suka menggambar sejak saya masih muda. Bahkan belakangan ini, saya sering pergi ke taman dan menggambar.

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
幼い頃から絵を描くことが好きでした。最近でもよく公園に行って絵を描いています。

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Ich habe schon seit meiner Jugend gerne gezeichnet. Auch heute noch gehe ich oft in den Park und zeichne.

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我从小就喜欢画画。即使这些天，我也经常去公园画画。

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我從小就喜歡畫畫。即使這些天，我也經常去公園畫畫。

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мне нравилось рисовать с юных лет. Даже сейчас я часто хожу в парк и рисую.

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ฉันชอบวาดรูปตั้งแต่เด็กๆ ทุกวันนี้ฉันก็ไปสวนสาธารณะและวาดรูปบ่อยๆ

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Eu gostava de desenhar desde pequeno. Mesmo hoje em dia, costumo ir ao parque desenhar.

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मुझे बचपन से ही चित्रकारी करना पसंद था। इन दिनों भी मैं अक्सर पार्क में जाता हूं और चित्र बनाता हूं।

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Küçüklüğümden beri çizim yapmayı severdim. Bu günlerde bile sık sık parka gidip resim yapıyorum.

#######

I liked drawing since I was young. Even these days, I often go to the park and draw.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मलाई सानैदेखि चित्र बनाउन मन लाग्थ्यो। आजकल पनि म प्राय: पार्कमा गएर चित्र कोर्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំចូលចិត្តគូរតាំងពីតូច។ សូម្បី​តែ​ប៉ុន្មាន​ថ្ងៃ​នេះ ខ្ញុំ​ទៅ​លេង​សួន​ច្បារ និង​គូរ​ជា​ញឹក​ញាប់។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම පොඩි කාලේ ඉඳන් චිත්‍ර අඳින්න ආසයි. මේ දවස්වලත් මම නිතරම පාක් එකට ගිහින් චිත්‍ර අඳිනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি ছোট থেকেই ছবি আঁকা পছন্দ করতাম। এমনকি আজকাল, আমি প্রায়শই পার্কে যাই এবং আঁকি।

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 손수레에 수박을 그렇게 많이 실으면 안 돼. 조금씩 실어서 옮기라고.
나: 네. 그럴게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Đừng chất nhiều dưa hấu lên xe rùa như vậy. Chất từng ít lên rồi hãy chuyển đi.
B: Vâng. Tôi sẽ làm vậy.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.
B: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Non dovresti caricare così tante angurie in un carretto a mano. Caricalo a poco a poco e spostalo.
B: Sì, lo farò.

#######

A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.
B: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

B : Oui, je le ferai.

#######

A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.
B: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
R: No deberías cargar tantas sandías en un carrito de mano. Cárgalo poco a poco y muévelo.
B: Sí, lo haré.

#######

A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.
B: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

B: Ya, saya akan.

#######

A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.
B: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

B: はい、そうします。

#######

A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.
B: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

B: Ja, das werde ich.

#######

A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.
B: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

B: 是的，我会的。

#######

A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.
B: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

B: 是的，我會的。

#######

Б: Да, я это сделаю.

#######

A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.

g_text_audio_translate.th:

บี: ใช่ ฉันจะทำ

A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.
B: Yes, I will.

A: You shouldn't load so many watermelons in a handcart. Load it up little by little and move it.

बी: हाँ, मैं करूँगा।

B: हो, म गर्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ចម្លើយ៖ អ្នកមិនគួរផ្ទុកឪឡឹកច្រើននៅក្នុងរទេះនោះទេ។ ផ្ទុកវាឡើងបន្តិចម្តង ៗ ហើយផ្លាស់ទីវា។
ខ៖ បាទ ខ្ញុំនឹង។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
පිළිතුර: ඔබ අත් කරත්තයක එතරම් කොමඩු පටවා නොගත යුතුය. එය ටිකෙන් ටික පටවා එය චලනය කරන්න.
B: ඔව්, මම කරන්නම්.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তর: আপনার একটি হ্যান্ডকার্টে এত তরমুজ লোড করা উচিত নয়। অল্প অল্প করে লোড করুন এবং সরান।
বি: হ্যাঁ, আমি করব।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
ဖြေ- ဖရဲသီးအများကြီးကို လက်တွန်းလှည်းထဲမှာ မတင်သင့်ပါဘူး။ ဖြည်းဖြည်းချင်း တင်ပြီး ရွှေ့လိုက်ပါ။
B: ဟုတ်ကဲ့ လိုက်ပါ့မယ်။

general.g_text_audio:
가: 몇 시에 친구를 만나요?
나: 세 시에 만나요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Chị gặp bạn lúc mấy giờ?
B: Tôi gặp lúc ba giờ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: What time do you meet your friends?
B: I'll meet them at three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: A che ora incontri i tuoi amici?
B: Li incontrerò alle tre.

#######

A: What time do you meet your friends?
B: I'll meet them at three o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

B : Je les retrouverai à trois heures.

A: What time do you meet your friends?
B: I'll meet them at three o'clock.

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 음식 만드는 것을 좋아합니다. 지금도 음식을 만들고 있습니다. 오늘은 맛있는 생선 요리를 하려고 합니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tôi thích nấu ăn. Bây giờ tôi cũng đang nấu ăn. Hôm nay tôi định nấu món cá thật ngon.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I love making food. I am making food now. Today I am going to cook a delicious fish dish.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Adoro preparare il cibo. Sto preparando da mangiare adesso. Oggi cucinerò un delizioso piatto di pesce.

I love making food. I am making food now. Today I am going to cook a delicious fish dish.

I love making food. I am making food now. Today I am going to cook a delicious fish dish.

I love making food. I am making food now. Today I am going to cook a delicious fish dish.

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 축사 일이 많이 힘들지?
나: 고향에 있을 때도 소나 돼지를 기른 적이 있어서 별로 힘들지 않습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Việc ở chuồng trại có vất vả không?
B: Tôi từng nuôi bò, lợn ở quê rồi nên không vất vả lắm.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: È difficile lavorare nella stalla?
B: Quando ero nella mia città natale, allevavo mucche o maiali, quindi non è così difficile.

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Est-ce difficile de travailler à l'étable ?
B : Quand j'étais dans ma ville natale, j'élevais des vaches ou des cochons, donc ce n'est pas si difficile.

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: ¿Es difícil trabajar en el establo de ganado?
B: Cuando estaba en mi ciudad natal, criaba vacas o cerdos, así que no es tan difícil.

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Apakah sulit bekerja di kandang ternak?
B: Waktu saya di kampung halaman, saya beternak sapi atau babi, jadi tidak terlalu sulit.

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A: 牛舎で働くのは大変ですか？
B: 地元にいた時は牛や豚を飼っていたので、そんなに大変ではありません。

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
A: Ist es schwer im Viehstall zu arbeiten?
B: Als ich in meiner Heimatstadt war, habe ich Kühe oder Schweine gezüchtet, also ist es nicht so schwer.

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A: 在牛棚工作辛苦吗？
B：我在老家的时候，养过牛或猪，所以没有那么辛苦。

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A: 在牛棚工作辛苦嗎？
B：我在老家的時候，養過牛或豬，所以沒有那麼辛苦。

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
А: Тяжело ли работать в сарае для скота?
Б: Когда я был в своем родном городе, я разводил коров или свиней, так что это не так уж сложно.

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
A: การทำงานที่โรงเลี้ยงโคมันยากไหม?
B: ตอนที่ฉันอยู่บ้านฉันเลี้ยงวัวหรือหมูก็เลยไม่ยาก

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
A: É difícil trabalhar no estábulo?
B: Quando eu estava na minha cidade natal, eu criava vacas ou porcos, então não é tão difícil.

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: क्या पशुशाला में काम करना कठिन है?
बी: जब मैं अपने गृहनगर में था, मैंने गाय या सूअर पाले थे, इसलिए यह उतना कठिन नहीं है।

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
A: Sığır barakasında çalışmak zor mu?
B: Memleketimdeyken inek ya da domuz yetiştiriyordum, o yüzden o kadar da zor değil.

#######

A: Is it hard to work at the cattle shed?
B: When I was in my hometown, I raised cows or pigs, so it's not that hard.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: के गाईवस्तु गोठमा काम गर्न गाह्रो छ?
B: जब म मेरो गृहनगरमा थिएँ, मैले गाई वा सुँगुर पालें, त्यसैले यो त्यति गाह्रो छैन।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ចម្លើយ៖ តើ​ការ​ធ្វើ​ការ​នៅ​កន្លែង​ចិញ្ចឹម​គោ​ពិបាក​ទេ?
ខ៖ ពេល​ខ្ញុំ​នៅ​ស្រុក​កំណើត ខ្ញុំ​ចិញ្ចឹម​គោ ឬ​ជ្រូក អ៊ីចឹង​អត់​ពិបាក​ទេ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
පිළිතුර - හරක් මඩුවේ වැඩ කරන්න අමාරුද?
ආ.. මම අපේ ගමේ ඉන්නකොට හරක් හරි ඌරෝ හරි ඇති කරපු නිසා එච්චර අමාරු නෑ.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তর: গোয়ালঘরে কাজ করা কি কঠিন?
বি: আমি যখন আমার শহরে ছিলাম, তখন আমি গরু বা শূকর পালন করতাম, তাই এটা তেমন কঠিন নয়।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
ဖြေ- နွားခြံမှာ အလုပ်လုပ်ရတာ ခက်သလား။
B: ကျွန်တော်မွေးရပ်မြေမှာတုန်းက နွားတွေ၊ ဝက်တွေကို မွေးမြူခဲ့တယ်ဆိုတော့ သိပ်မခက်ပါဘူး။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 지금 몇 시예요?
나: 열한 시 사십 분이에요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Mấy giờ rồi nhỉ?
B: 11 giờ 40 phút.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: What time is it now?
B: It's eleven and forty.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
R: Che ore sono adesso?
B: Sono le undici e quaranta.

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's eleven and forty.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Quelle heure est-il maintenant ?
B : Il est onze heures quarante.

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's eleven and forty.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
R: ¿Qué hora es ahora?
B: Son las once y cuarenta.

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's eleven and forty.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Jam berapa sekarang?
B: Sekarang jam sebelas empat puluh.

#######

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 밤방 씨, 그 절단기 말이야. 어제 날을 갈았거든. 손 다치기 쉬우니까 조심해서 하라고. 
나: 알겠습니다, 반장님.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Anh Bambang này, cái máy cắt đó. Hôm qua nó mới được thay lưỡi. Dễ bị thương ở tay lắm nên anh hãy cẩn thận.
B: Tôi biết rồi, tổ trưởng.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Bambang, riguardo al cutter. Ieri ho cambiato il bordo. È facile ferirsi la mano, quindi fai attenzione.
B: Va bene, signore.


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A: Bambang, à propos du cutter. J'ai changé le bord hier. Il est facile de se blesser la main, alors soyez prudent.
B : D'accord, monsieur.


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
R: Bambang, sobre el cortador. Ayer cambié el borde. Es fácil lastimarse la mano, así que tenga cuidado.
B: Muy bien, señor.


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Bambang, tentang pemotong. Saya mengubah tepi kemarin. Tangan Anda mudah terluka, jadi berhati-hatilah.
B: Baik, Pak.


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A: バンバン、カッターについてです。昨日エッジを変えました。手を怪我しやすいので、気をつけてください。
B: わかりました。


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
A: Bambang, über den Cutter. Die Kante habe ich gestern gewechselt. Es ist leicht, sich die Hand zu verletzen, seien Sie also vorsichtig.
B: In Ordnung, mein Herr.


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A: Bambang，关于刀具。我昨天换了边。很容易伤到你的手，所以要小心。
B：好的，先生。


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A: Bambang，關於刀具。我昨天換了邊。很容易傷到你的手，所以要小心。
B：好的，先生。


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
A: Бамбанг, насчет резака. Я вчера поменял край. Руку легко поранить, поэтому будьте осторожны.
Б: Хорошо, сэр.


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
A: บัมบัง เกี่ยวกับคัตเตอร์ เมื่อวานเปลี่ยนขอบแล้ว. มันง่ายที่จะทำร้ายมือของคุณ ดังนั้นควรระวัง
บี : ได้เลยนาย


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
R: Bambang, sobre o cortador. Mudei a borda ontem. É fácil machucar sua mão, então tome cuidado.
B: Tudo bem, senhor.


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
ए: बंबांग, कटर के बारे में। मैंने कल किनारा बदल दिया। आपके हाथ को चोट पहुँचाना आसान है, इसलिए सावधान रहें।
बी: ठीक है सर.


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
C: Bambang, kesici hakkında. Dün kenarını değiştirdim. Elinizi incitmek kolaydır, bu yüzden dikkatli olun.
B: Peki efendim.


#######

A: Bambang, about the cutter. I changed the edge yesterday. It's easy to hurt your hand, so be careful. 
B: All right, sir.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: Bambang, कटरको बारेमा। मैले हिजो किनारा परिवर्तन गरें। आफ्नो हात दुखाउन सजिलो छ, त्यसैले सावधान रहनुहोस्।
B: ठीक छ, सर।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
A: Bambang អំពីអ្នកកាប់។ ខ្ញុំបានផ្លាស់ប្តូរគែមកាលពីម្សិលមិញ។ វាងាយនឹងធ្វើឱ្យដៃរបស់អ្នកឈឺចាប់ ដូច្នេះត្រូវប្រយ័ត្ន។
ខ៖ មិនអីទេលោក។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
A: බම්බං, කපනය ගැන. මම ඊයේ දාරය වෙනස් කළා. අත රිදෙන එක ලේසි නිසා පරිස්සම් වෙන්න.
ආ: හරි සර්.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তর: বামবাং, কাটার সম্পর্কে। আমি গতকাল প্রান্ত পরিবর্তন. আপনার হাতে আঘাত করা সহজ, তাই সতর্ক থাকুন।
বি: ঠিক আছে, স্যার।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
A: Bambang၊ မီးရှုးစက်အကြောင်း။ မနေ့က အစွန်းကို ပြောင်းလိုက်တယ်။ လက်ကို ထိခိုက်လွယ်တာမို့ သတိထားပါ။
B: ကောင်းပြီ သခင်။

general.g_text_audio: 날마다 일곱 시에 일어납니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tôi thức dậy lúc 7 giờ mỗi ngày.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I wake up at 7 o'clock every day.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Mi sveglio alle 7 tutti i giorni.

#######

I wake up at 7 o'clock every day.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Je me réveille à 7 heures tous les jours.

#######

I wake up at 7 o'clock every day.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Me despierto a las 7 en punto todos los días.

#######

I wake up at 7 o'clock every day.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya bangun jam 7 setiap hari.

#######

I wake up at 7 o'clock every day.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私は毎日7時に起きます。

#######

I wake up at 7 o'clock every day.

Ich wache jeden Tag um 7 Uhr auf.

#######

#######

#######

I wake up at 7 o'clock every day.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Acordo às 7 horas todos os dias.

#######

I wake up at 7 o'clock every day.

मैं हर दिन 7 बजे उठता हूं.

#######

I wake up at 7 o'clock every day.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Her gün saat 7'de uyanıyorum.

#######

I wake up at 7 o'clock every day.

g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំ​ភ្ញាក់​ពី​ដំណេក​នៅ​ម៉ោង ៧ យប់​ជា​រៀង​រាល់​ថ្ងៃ។

general.g_text_audio:
가: 뭐 하세요?
나: 책을 읽고 있어요. 내일까지 이 책을 다 읽어 가는 것이 숙제거든요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Chị làm gì vậy?
B: Tôi đang đọc sách. Vì đọc xong quyển này trước ngày mai là bài tập của tôi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: What are you doing?
B: I'm reading a book. My homework is to finish reading this book by tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
R: Cosa stai facendo?
B: Sto leggendo un libro. Il mio compito è finire di leggere questo libro entro domani.

#######

A: What are you doing?
B: I'm reading a book. My homework is to finish reading this book by tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

B : Je lis un livre. Mon devoir est de finir de lire ce livre d'ici demain.

#######

A: What are you doing?
B: I'm reading a book. My homework is to finish reading this book by tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

B: Estoy leyendo un libro. Mi tarea es terminar de leer este libro para mañana.

#######

A: What are you doing?
B: I'm reading a book. My homework is to finish reading this book by tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

#######

A: What are you doing?
B: I'm reading a book. My homework is to finish reading this book by tomorrow.

#######

A: What are you doing?
B: I'm reading a book. My homework is to finish reading this book by tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

#######

A: What are you doing?
B: I'm reading a book. My homework is to finish reading this book by tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

#######

A: What are you doing?

g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

B：我在看書。我的作業是在明天之前讀完這本書。

#######

A: What are you doing?
B: I'm reading a book. My homework is to finish reading this book by tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

#######

A: What are you doing?
B: I'm reading a book. My homework is to finish reading this book by tomorrow.
g_text_audio_translate.th:

#######

A: What are you doing?
B: I'm reading a book. My homework is to finish reading this book by tomorrow.

B: Estou lendo um livro. Minha lição de casa é terminar de ler este livro até amanhã.

ආ: මම පොතක් කියවනවා. හෙට වෙනකොට මේ පොත කියවලා ඉවර කරන්න තමයි මගේ ගෙදර වැඩ.

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 관장님, 비가 올 것 같은데요. 
나: 그럼 시멘트 반죽하지 말고 건물 안으로 옮겨 그리고 다른 장비들도 정리하고.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Quản lý, chắc là trời sẽ mưa đó.
B: Vậy thì anh đừng trộn xi măng nữa mà hãy chuyển vào trong và sắp xếp những dụng cụ khác đi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Direttore, sembra che stia per piovere.
B: Allora, invece di impastare il cemento, faresti meglio a spostarlo nell'edificio e organizzare altre attrezzature.

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Manager, on dirait qu'il va pleuvoir.
B : Ensuite, au lieu de pétrir le ciment, vous feriez mieux de le déplacer dans le bâtiment et d'organiser d'autres équipements.

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: Gerente, parece que va a llover.
B: Entonces, en lugar de amasar cemento, será mejor que lo muevas al edificio y organices otros equipos.

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Manajer, sepertinya akan turun hujan.
B: Kalau begitu, daripada menguleni semen, lebih baik Anda memindahkannya ke dalam gedung dan mengatur peralatan lainnya.

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A: マネージャー、雨が降りそうです。
B: では、セメントをこねる代わりに、建物内に移動させて、その他の設備を整理した方がよいでしょう。

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
A: Manager, es sieht so aus, als würde es regnen.
B: Dann, anstatt Zement zu kneten, solltest du ihn besser in das Gebäude bringen und andere Ausrüstung organisieren.

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A: 经理，看起来要下雨了。
B：那么，你最好把它搬进大楼里，整理其他设备，而不是揉水泥。

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A: 經理，看起來要下雨了。
B：那麼，你最好把它搬進大樓裡，整理其他設備，而不是揉水泥。

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
А: Менеджер, похоже, будет дождь.
Б: Тогда вместо того, чтобы месить цемент, вам лучше перенести его в здание и организовать другое оборудование.

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ตอบ: ผู้จัดการ ดูเหมือนว่าฝนจะตก
B: งั้น แทนที่จะนวดปูนซีเมนต์ คุณควรย้ายมันเข้าไปในอาคารและจัดอุปกรณ์อื่นๆ แทน

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
R: Gerente, parece que vai chover.
B: Então, em vez de amassar cimento, é melhor movê-lo para dentro do prédio e organizar outros equipamentos.

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: प्रबंधक, ऐसा लग रहा है कि बारिश होने वाली है।
बी: फिर, सीमेंट को गूंधने के बजाय, बेहतर होगा कि आप इसे इमारत में ले जाएं और अन्य उपकरणों को व्यवस्थित करें।

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
C: Müdürüm, yağmur yağacak gibi görünüyor.
B: O zaman çimentoyu yoğurmak yerine onu binaya taşıyıp diğer ekipmanları organize etsen iyi olur.

#######

A: Manager, it looks like it's going to rain.
B: Then, instead of kneading cement, you'd better move it into the building and organize other equipment.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: प्रबन्धक, यस्तो देखिन्छ कि यो पानी पर्न गइरहेको छ।
B: त्यसोभए, सिमेन्ट गुड्नुको सट्टा, तपाईले यसलाई भवनमा सार्नु र अन्य उपकरणहरू व्यवस्थित गर्नु राम्रो हुन्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
A: អ្នកគ្រប់គ្រង វាហាក់ដូចជាភ្លៀង។
ខ៖ បន្ទាប់មក ជំនួសឱ្យការច្របាច់ស៊ីម៉ងត៍ អ្នកគួរតែផ្លាស់ទីវាទៅក្នុងអាគារ ហើយរៀបចំឧបករណ៍ផ្សេងទៀត។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
A: කළමනාකරු, වහින්න යනවා වගේ.
B: එවිට, සිමෙන්ති දණීම වෙනුවට, ඔබ එය ගොඩනැගිල්ලට ගෙන ගොස් වෙනත් උපකරණ සංවිධානය කිරීම වඩා හොඳය.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তরঃ ম্যানেজার, মনে হচ্ছে বৃষ্টি হবে।

나: 친구하고 배드민턴을 했어요.

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 실례지만 어떤 일을 하세요?
나: 포크레인 기사예요. 포크레인으로 땅을 파는 일을 해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Xin lỗi nhưng anh làm nghề gì? 
B: Tôi là lái xe đào đất. Tôi làm công việc đào đất bằng xe đào đất.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Excuse me, but what do you do?
B: I'm an excavator driver. I work digging with an excavator.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Scusami, ma cosa fai?
B: Sono un autista di escavatori. Lavoro scavando con un escavatore.

#######

A: Excuse me, but what do you do?
B: I'm an excavator driver. I work digging with an excavator.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Excusez-moi, mais que faites-vous ?
B : Je suis conducteur d'excavatrice. Je travaille à creuser avec une excavatrice.

#######

A: Excuse me, but what do you do?
B: I'm an excavator driver. I work digging with an excavator.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: Disculpe, pero ¿qué hace?
B: Soy conductor de excavadora. Trabajo excavando con una excavadora.

#######

A: Excuse me, but what do you do?
B: I'm an excavator driver. I work digging with an excavator.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Maaf, tapi apa yang Anda lakukan?
B: Saya seorang pengemudi ekskavator. Saya bekerja menggali dengan ekskavator.

#######

A: Excuse me, but what do you do?
B: I'm an excavator driver. I work digging with an excavator.

B: 私は掘削機の運転手です。ショベルで掘削作業をしています。

#######

A: Excuse me, but what do you do?
B: I'm an excavator driver. I work digging with an excavator.

B: Ich bin Baggerfahrer. Ich arbeite mit einem Bagger.

#######

A: Excuse me, but what do you do?

B：我是一名挖掘机司机。我用挖掘机挖矿。

B: I'm an excavator driver. I work digging with an excavator.

B：我是一名挖掘機司機。我用挖掘機挖礦。

Б: Я водитель экскаватора. Я копаю экскаватором.

B: I'm an excavator driver. I work digging with an excavator.

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저희 아버지는 시골에서 소를 키우십니다. 소가 많기 때문에 아버지는 외양간에서 하루 종일 일하십니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Bố tôi chăn bò ở quê. Vì có nhiều bò nên bố tôi phải làm việc cả ngày ở chuồng bò.
g_text_audio_translate.en: My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Mio padre alleva bestiame in campagna. Poiché ci sono così tanti capi di bestiame, mio ​​padre lavora tutto il giorno nella stalla.

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Mon père élève du bétail à la campagne. Parce qu'il y a tellement de bétail, mon père travaille toute la journée dans la grange.

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mi padre cría ganado en el campo. Como hay tanto ganado, mi padre trabaja todo el día en el establo.

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Ayah saya beternak sapi di pedesaan. Karena sapinya banyak sekali, ayah saya bekerja seharian di kandang.

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私の父は田舎で牛を飼っています。牛がたくさんいるので、父は納屋で一日中働いています。

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mein Vater züchtet Vieh auf dem Land. Weil es so viele Rinder gibt, arbeitet mein Vater den ganzen Tag im Stall.

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我父亲在乡下养牛。因为牛太多，爸爸整天在谷仓里干活。

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我父親在鄉下養牛。因為牛太多，爸爸整天在穀倉里幹活。

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мой отец выращивает скот в деревне. Поскольку скота так много, мой отец весь день работает в сарае.

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
พ่อของฉันเลี้ยงวัวในชนบท เนื่องจากมีวัวจำนวนมาก พ่อของฉันจึงทำงานในโรงนาทั้งวัน

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Meu pai cria gado no campo. Como tem tanto gado, meu pai trabalha o dia todo no celeiro.

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मेरे पिता ग्रामीण इलाकों में मवेशी पालते हैं। क्योंकि वहाँ बहुत सारे मवेशी हैं, मेरे पिता सारा दिन खलिहान में काम करते हैं।

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Babam kırsalda sığır yetiştiriyor. Çok fazla sığır olduğu için babam bütün gün ahırda çalışıyor.

#######

My father raises cattle in the countryside. Because there are so many cattle, my father works all day in the barn.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मेरो बुबा गाउँमा गाईवस्तु पाल्छन्। धेरै गाईवस्तु भएकाले मेरो बुबा दिनभर गोठमा काम गर्नुहुन्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ឪពុក​ខ្ញុំ​ចិញ្ចឹម​គោ​នៅ​ជនបទ។ ដោយសារមានគោក្របីច្រើន ឪពុកខ្ញុំធ្វើការពេញមួយថ្ងៃនៅក្នុងជង្រុក។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මගේ තාත්තා පිටිසර හරක් ඇති කරනවා. ගොඩක් හරක් ඉන්න නිසා තාත්තා දවසම වැඩ කරන්නේ ගාලේ.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমার বাবা গ্রামাঞ্চলে গবাদি পশু পালন করেন। অনেক গবাদি পশু আছে বলে আমার বাবা সারাদিন শস্যাগারে কাজ করেন।
g_text_audio_translate.my: အဖေက ကျေးလက်မှာ နွားမွေးတယ်။ နွားတွေ အများကြီးဆိုတော့ အဖေက စပါးကျီမှာ တနေကုန် အလုပ်လုပ်တယ်။

general.g_text_audio:
가: 일요일에 뭐하셨어요?
나: 남편하고 같이 등산을 했어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Thứ bảy chị đã làm gì?
B: Tôi cùng chồng đi leo núi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: What did you do on Saturday?
B: I went hiking with my husband.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Cosa hai fatto sabato?
B: Ho fatto un'escursione con mio marito.

#######

A: What did you do on Saturday?
B: I went hiking with my husband.

B : J'ai fait de la randonnée avec mon mari.

#######

A: What did you do on Saturday?
B: I went hiking with my husband.

B: Fui de excursión con mi marido.

#######

A: What did you do on Saturday?
B: I went hiking with my husband.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Apa yang kamu lakukan pada hari Sabtu?
B: Saya pergi hiking dengan suami saya.

#######

A: What did you do on Saturday?
B: I went hiking with my husband.

#######

A: What did you do on Saturday?
B: I went hiking with my husband.

B: Ich war mit meinem Mann wandern.

#######

A: What did you do on Saturday?
B: I went hiking with my husband.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

B：我和我丈夫去爬山了。

#######

A: What did you do on Saturday?
B: I went hiking with my husband.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

#######

A: What did you do on Saturday?
B: I went hiking with my husband.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

#######

B: I went hiking with my husband.

B: I went hiking with my husband.

ආ: මම මගේ ස්වාමිපුරුෂයා සමඟ පයින් ගියා.

ආ.. නෑ.. ඔතන අසුරන සලාද කොළ ටිකත් පටවන්න ඕන.

나: 여섯 시 삼십 분에 만나기로 했습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

B: We decided to meet at 6:30.

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:

B: Yes. I had dinner earlier. I'm washing the dishes now.

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 내일도 날씨가 나쁘면 어떻게 하지요? 
나: 못 나가고 오늘처럼 그물하고 통발이나 손봐야겠지.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Nếu ngày mai thời tiết vẫn xấu thì chúng ta sẽ làm gì?
B: Chúng ta không thể ra ngoài mà phải sửa lưới và cái giỏ bắt cá như hôm nay thôi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: E se domani il tempo è brutto?
B: Non potremo uscire e dovremo sistemare reti e nasse come oggi.

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Et s'il faisait mauvais temps demain ?
B : Nous ne pourrons pas sortir, et nous devrons réparer les filets et les nasses comme aujourd'hui.

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: ¿Qué pasa si el clima es malo mañana?
B: No podremos salir, y tendremos que arreglar redes y trampas para peces como hoy.

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Bagaimana jika cuaca buruk besok?
B: Kami tidak bisa keluar, dan kami harus memperbaiki jaring dan perangkap ikan seperti hari ini.

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A: 明日天気が悪かったらどうしますか?
B: 私たちは外出できなくなり、今日のように網や魚の罠を修理する必要があります。

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
A: Was ist, wenn das Wetter morgen schlecht ist?
B: Wir werden nicht rausgehen können, und wir werden wie heute Netze und Reusen reparieren müssen.

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A: 如果明天天气不好怎么办？
B：我们不能出去了，得像今天一样去修网、设鱼夹。

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A: 如果明天天氣不好怎麼辦？
B：我們不能出去了，得像今天一樣去修網、設魚夾。

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
А: Что, если завтра будет плохая погода?
Б: Мы не сможем выйти на улицу, и нам придется чинить сети и ловушки для рыбы, как сегодня.

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
A: ถ้าพรุ่งนี้อากาศไม่ดีล่ะ?
B: เราออกไปข้างนอกไม่ได้ ก็ต้องซ่อมอวนและกับดักปลาเหมือนวันนี้

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
R: E se o tempo estiver ruim amanhã?
B: Não poderemos sair e teremos que consertar redes e armadilhas para peixes como hoje.

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: यदि कल मौसम ख़राब हो तो क्या होगा?
बी: हम बाहर नहीं जा पाएंगे, और हमें आज की तरह जाल और मछली के जाल ठीक करने होंगे।

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
C: Ya yarın hava kötü olursa?
B: Dışarı çıkamayacağız ve bugünkü gibi ağları ve balık tuzaklarını tamir etmemiz gerekecek.

#######

A: What if the weather is bad tomorrow ? 
B: We won't be able to go out, and we will have to fix nets and fish traps like today.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: भोलि मौसम खराब भयो भने के हुन्छ?
B: हामी बाहिर जान सक्नेछैनौं, र हामीले आज जस्तै जाल र माछाको पासो मिलाउनु पर्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
A: ចុះបើអាកាសធាតុអាក្រក់នៅថ្ងៃស្អែក?
ខ៖ យើង​នឹង​មិន​អាច​ចេញ​ទៅ​ក្រៅ​បាន​ទេ ហើយ​យើង​នឹង​ត្រូវ​ជួសជុល​សំណាញ់ និង​អន្ទាក់​ត្រី​ដូច​សព្វ​ថ្ងៃ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
පිළිතුර: හෙට කාලගුණය අයහපත් නම්?
ආ.. අපිට එළියට යන්න බැරි වෙයි, අද වගේ දැල්, මාළු උගුල් හදන්න වෙනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তর: আগামীকাল আবহাওয়া খারাপ হলে কী হবে?
বি: আমরা বাইরে যেতে পারব না, এবং আমাদের আজকের মত জাল এবং মাছের ফাঁদ ঠিক করতে হবে।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
A : မနက်ဖြန် ရာသီဥတု မကောင်းရင် ဘယ်လိုလုပ်မလဲ။
B: ငါတို့ အပြင်မထွက်ရဘူး၊ ဒီနေ့လို ပိုက်ကွန်နဲ့ ငါးထောင်ချောက်တွေကို ပြင်ရလိမ့်မယ်။

general.g_text_audio:
가: 작년에도 이 일을 하셨습니까?
나: 네. 작년부터 옷 만드는 일을 했습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Năm ngoái chị cũng làm việc này à?
B: Vâng. Tôi làm công việc sản xuất quần áo từ năm ngoái.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: L'hai fatto anche l'anno scorso?
B Sì. Faccio vestiti dall'anno scorso.

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A: Avez-vous fait cela l'année dernière aussi?
B : Oui. Je fais des vêtements depuis l'année dernière.

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: ¿Hiciste esto el año pasado también?
B: Sí. Hago ropa desde el año pasado.

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Apakah Anda melakukan ini tahun lalu juga?
B: Ya. Saya sudah membuat pakaian sejak tahun lalu.

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A: 去年もやったの？
B: はい。去年から服を作っています。

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
A: Hast du das letztes Jahr auch gemacht?
B: Ja. Ich mache seit letztem Jahr Kleidung.

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A：你去年也是这样吗？
乙：是的。我从去年开始做衣服。

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A：你去年也是這樣嗎？
乙：是的。我從去年開始做衣服。

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
А: Вы делали это и в прошлом году?
Б: Да. Я занимаюсь одеждой с прошлого года.

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
A: ปีที่แล้วคุณก็ทำแบบนี้เหมือนกันเหรอ?
B: ใช่. ฉันทำเสื้อผ้าตั้งแต่ปีที่แล้ว

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
A: Você fez isso no ano passado também?
B: Sim. Faço roupas desde o ano passado.

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: क्या आपने पिछले साल भी ऐसा किया था?
बी: हाँ. मैं पिछले साल से कपड़े बना रहा हूं।

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
A: Bunu geçen yıl da yaptın mı?
B: Evet. Geçen yıldan beri kıyafet dikiyorum.

#######

A: Did you do this last year too?
B: Yes. I've been making clothes since last year.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: के तपाईंले गत वर्ष पनि यो गर्नुभयो?
B: हो। गत वर्षदेखि कपडा बनाउँदै आएको छु ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
A: តើអ្នកធ្លាប់ធ្វើបែបនេះកាលពីឆ្នាំមុនដែរទេ?
ខ៖ បាទ។ ខ្ញុំ​បាន​ធ្វើ​សម្លៀក​បំពាក់​តាំង​ពី​ឆ្នាំ​មុន។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
පි: ගිය අවුරුද්දෙත් මේක කළාද?
B: ඔව්. මම ගිය අවුරුද්දේ ඉඳන් ඇඳුම් හැදුවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তর: আপনি কি গত বছরও এটি করেছিলেন?
বি: হ্যাঁ। আমি গত বছর থেকে কাপড় তৈরি করছি।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
ဖြေ- မနှစ်က ဒီလိုလုပ်ခဲ့တာလား။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 제 취미는 사진 찍기입니다. 주말에는 보통 사진을 찍으러 공원에 갑니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Sở thích của tôi là chụp ảnh. Cuối tuần tôi thường đi công viên để chụp ảnh.
g_text_audio_translate.en: My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Il mio hobby è fotografare. Nei fine settimana di solito vado al parco a fare foto.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Mon passe-temps est de prendre des photos. Le week-end, je vais généralement au parc pour prendre des photos.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mi hobby es tomar fotografías. Los fines de semana suelo ir al parque a hacer fotos.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Hobi saya memotret. Di akhir pekan, saya biasanya pergi ke taman untuk berfoto.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私の趣味は写真を撮ることです。週末はよく公園に行って写真を撮ります。

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mein Hobby ist Fotografieren. Am Wochenende gehe ich meistens in den Park, um Fotos zu machen.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我的爱好是拍照。周末，我通常去公园拍照。

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我的愛好是拍照。週末，我通常去公園拍照。

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мое хобби — фотографировать. По выходным я обычно хожу в парк фотографироваться.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
งานอดิเรกของฉันคือการถ่ายภาพ วันหยุดสุดสัปดาห์ ฉันมักจะไปสวนสาธารณะเพื่อถ่ายรูป

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Meu hobby é tirar fotos. Nos finais de semana costumo ir ao parque tirar fotos.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मेरा शौक तस्वीरें लेना है. सप्ताहांत पर, मैं आमतौर पर तस्वीरें लेने के लिए पार्क में जाता हूँ।

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Hobim fotoğraf çekmek. Hafta sonları genellikle fotoğraf çekmek için parka giderim.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. On weekends, I usually go to the park to take pictures.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मेरो शौक तस्विर खिच्नु हो। सप्ताहन्तमा, म प्राय: पार्कमा फोटो खिच्न जान्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ចំណង់ចំណូលចិត្តរបស់ខ្ញុំគឺថតរូប។ នៅ​ថ្ងៃ​ចុង​សប្ដាហ៍ ខ្ញុំ​ជា​ធម្មតា​ទៅ​លេង​សួន​ដើម្បី​ថត​រូប។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මගේ විනෝදාංශය පින්තූර ගැනීමයි. සති අන්තයේ මම සාමාන්‍යයෙන් උද්‍යානයට යනවා පින්තූර ගන්න.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমার শখ ছবি তোলা। সপ্তাহান্তে, আমি সাধারণত পার্কে ছবি তুলতে যাই।
g_text_audio_translate.my: ဓာတ်ပုံရိုက်ရတာ ဝါသနာပါတယ်။ ပိတ်ရက်တွေမှာ ဓာတ်ပုံရိုက်ဖို့ ပန်းခြံကို သွားလေ့ရှိပါတယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 지금 가구 공장에서 일하고 있습니다. 가구를 만드는 일이 힘들지만 재미있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Hiện tại tôi đang làm việc tại nhà máy sản xuất đồ nội thất. Việc sản xuất đồ nội thất thì khó nhưng rất thú vị.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Ora lavoro in una fabbrica di mobili. È difficile realizzare mobili, ma è divertente.

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Je travaille maintenant dans une usine de meubles. C'est difficile de fabriquer des meubles, mais c'est amusant.

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Ahora estoy trabajando en una fábrica de muebles. Es difícil hacer muebles, pero es divertido.

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya sekarang bekerja di pabrik mebel. Membuat furnitur memang sulit, tapi menyenangkan.

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私は今、家具工場で働いています。家具を作るのは大変だけど楽しい。

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Ich arbeite jetzt in einer Möbelfabrik. Es ist schwer, Möbel herzustellen, aber es macht Spaß.

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我现在在一家家具厂工作。做家具很难，但很有趣。

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我現在在一家家具廠工作。做家具很難，但很有趣。

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Сейчас я работаю на мебельной фабрике. Делать мебель сложно, но весело.

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ตอนนี้ฉันทำงานที่โรงงานเฟอร์นิเจอร์ การทำเฟอร์นิเจอร์เป็นเรื่องยากแต่ก็สนุกดี

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Agora estou trabalhando em uma fábrica de móveis. É difícil fazer móveis, mas é divertido.

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मैं अब एक फ़र्निचर फ़ैक्टरी में काम कर रहा हूँ। फ़र्निचर बनाना कठिन है, लेकिन मज़ेदार है।

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Şu anda bir mobilya fabrikasında çalışıyorum. Mobilya yapmak zordur ama eğlencelidir.

#######

I am now working at a furniture factory. It's hard to make furniture, but it's fun.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: म अहिले फर्निचर कारखानामा काम गर्छु। फर्नीचर बनाउन गाह्रो छ, तर यो रमाइलो छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ឥឡូវនេះខ្ញុំកំពុងធ្វើការនៅរោងចក្រគ្រឿងសង្ហារឹមមួយ។ វាពិបាកក្នុងការធ្វើគ្រឿងសង្ហារឹមប៉ុន្តែវាសប្បាយណាស់។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම දැන් ගෘහ භාණ්ඩ කම්හලක වැඩ කරනවා. ගෘහ භාණ්ඩ සෑදීම අපහසුයි, නමුත් එය විනෝදජනකයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি এখন একটি ফার্নিচার কারখানায় কাজ করছি। আসবাবপত্র তৈরি করা কঠিন, তবে এটি মজাদার।
g_text_audio_translate.my: အခုကျွန်တော်က ပရိဘောဂစက်ရုံမှာ အလုပ်လုပ်နေပါတယ်။ ပရိဘောဂလုပ်ရတာ ခက်ပေမယ့် ပျော်စရာကောင်းတယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 지금은 두 시입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Bây giờ là 2 giờ.
g_text_audio_translate.en: It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Adesso sono le due.

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Il est deux heures maintenant.

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Son las dos ahora.

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Sekarang jam dua.

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
今、2時です。

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Es ist jetzt zwei Uhr.

#######

It's two o'clock now.

现在是两点钟。

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
現在是兩點鐘。

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Сейчас два часа.

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ตอนนี้เป็นเวลาสองนาฬิกาแล้ว

#######

It's two o'clock now.

São duas horas agora.

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
अभी दो बजे हैं.

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Saat şu anda iki.

#######

It's two o'clock now.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: अहिले दुई बजेको छ ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ឥឡូវនេះម៉ោងពីរហើយ។
g_text_audio_translate.si: දැන් වෙලාව දෙකයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: এখন দুইটা বাজে।
g_text_audio_translate.my: အခု နှစ်နာရီထိုးနေပြီ။

general.g_text_audio:
가: 지수 씨, 지금 무엇을 하고 있어요?
나: 빨래를 하고 있어요. 세탁기에 넣을 수 없는 건 손으로 빨고 있어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Jisoo đang làm gì vậy?
B: Tôi đang giặt giũ. Tôi giặt bằng tay những món đồ không thể cho vào máy giặt được.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Jisoo, cosa stai facendo ora?
B: Sto facendo il bucato. Lavo a mano le cose che non possono essere messe in lavatrice.

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Jisoo, qu'est-ce que tu fais maintenant ?
B : Je fais la lessive. Je lave les choses qui ne peuvent pas être mises dans la machine à laver à la main.

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: Jisoo, ¿qué estás haciendo ahora?
B: Estoy lavando la ropa. Lavo cosas que no se pueden poner en la lavadora a mano.

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Jisoo, apa yang kamu lakukan sekarang?
B: Saya sedang mencuci baju. Saya mencuci barang-barang yang tidak bisa dimasukkan ke dalam mesin cuci dengan tangan.

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A:ジス、今何してるの？
B: 洗濯をしています。洗濯機に入らないものは手洗い。

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

B: Ich wasche Wäsche. Was nicht in die Waschmaschine passt, wasche ich von Hand.

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A：Jisoo，你现在在做什么？
B：我在洗衣服。我手洗不能放入洗衣机的东西。

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.

B：我在洗衣服。我手洗不能放入洗衣機的東西。

B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Б: Я стираю. Вещи, которые нельзя положить в стиральную машину, я стираю вручную.

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
A: จีซู ตอนนี้คุณกำลังทำอะไรอยู่?
B: ฉันกำลังซักผ้าอยู่ ฉันล้างสิ่งของที่ไม่สามารถใส่ในเครื่องซักผ้าด้วยมือได้

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
A: Jisoo, o que você está fazendo agora?
B: Estou lavando roupa. Lavo à mão coisas que não podem ser colocadas na máquina de lavar.

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: जिसू, अब आप क्या कर रहे हैं?
बी: मैं कपड़े धो रहा हूं। मैं उन चीज़ों को हाथ से धोता हूँ जिन्हें वॉशिंग मशीन में नहीं डाला जा सकता।

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
A: Jisoo, şimdi ne yapıyorsun?
B: Çamaşır yıkıyorum. Elde çamaşır makinesine atılamayan eşyaları yıkıyorum.

#######

A: Jisoo, what are you doing now?
B: I am doing laundry. I wash things that cannot be put in the washing machine by hand.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: Jisoo, तपाईं अहिले के गर्दै हुनुहुन्छ?
B: म लुगा धुन्छु। म हातले धुने मेसिनमा राख्न नसकिने चीजहरू धुन्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
A: Jisoo តើអ្នកកំពុងធ្វើអ្វី?
ខ៖ ខ្ញុំកំពុងបោកគក់។ ខ្ញុំលាងសម្អាតរបស់ដែលមិនអាចដាក់ក្នុងម៉ាស៊ីនបោកគក់ដោយដៃបាន។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
A: Jisoo, ඔයා දැන් මොකද කරන්නේ?
ආ: මම රෙදි සෝදනවා. වොෂින් මැෂින් එකට දාන්න බැරි දේවල් අතින් හෝදනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উঃ জিসু, এখন কি করছ?
বি: আমি লন্ড্রি করছি। আমি এমন জিনিস ধুই যা ওয়াশিং মেশিনে হাত দিয়ে রাখা যায় না।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
A: Jisoo မင်းအခုဘာလုပ်နေတာလဲ။
B: ငါ အဝတ်လျှော်နေတယ်။ အဝတ်လျှော်စက်ထဲမှာ လက်နဲ့ထည့်လို့မရတဲ့အရာတွေကို ငါဆေးကြောတယ်။

가: 요즘은 무슨 일을 해?
나: 식당에 채소를 배달하는 일을 하고 있어.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Dạo này anh đang làm gì?
B: Tôi làm công việc giao rau tới nhà hàng.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: What are you doing these days?
B: I'm working on delivering vegetables to restaurants.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Cosa stai facendo in questi giorni?
B: Sto lavorando per consegnare verdure ai ristoranti.

#######

B: I'm working on delivering vegetables to restaurants.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

B : Je travaille sur la livraison de légumes aux restaurants.

#######

A: What are you doing these days?
B: I'm working on delivering vegetables to restaurants.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: ¿Qué estás haciendo estos días?
B: Estoy trabajando en la entrega de verduras a los restaurantes.

#######

A: What are you doing these days?
B: I'm working on delivering vegetables to restaurants.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Apa yang kamu lakukan hari ini?
B: Saya sedang mengirim sayuran ke restoran.

#######

B: I'm working on delivering vegetables to restaurants.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 배 나무와 사과 나무가 있는 과수원에서 일합니다. 오늘은 배를 따서 하나씩 포장하는 일을 했습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tôi làm việc ở vườn lê và quýt. Hôm nay tôi đã làm công việc hái lê và gói từng quả một.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Lavoro in un frutteto con peri e meli. Oggi ho raccolto le pere e le ho confezionate una per una.

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Je travaille dans un verger de poiriers et de pommiers. Aujourd'hui, j'ai cueilli des poires et je les ai emballées une par une.

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Trabajo en un huerto con perales y manzanos. Hoy recogí peras y las empaque una por una.

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya bekerja di kebun dengan pohon pir dan apel. Hari ini, saya memetik buah pir dan mengemasnya satu per satu.

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私はナシとリンゴの木のある果樹園で働いています。今日は、梨を摘み、一つ一つ詰めました。

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Ich arbeite in einem Obstgarten mit Birnen- und Apfelbäumen. Heute habe ich Birnen gepflückt und eine nach der anderen verpackt.

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我在种植梨树和苹果树的果园工作。今天，我摘了梨，一个一个地打包。

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我在種植梨樹和蘋果樹的果園工作。今天，我摘了梨，一個一個地打包。

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Я работаю в саду с грушами и яблонями. Сегодня я собрала груши и упаковала их по одной.

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ฉันทำงานในสวนผลไม้ที่มีต้นแพร์และต้นแอปเปิ้ล วันนี้ฉันเก็บลูกแพร์และบรรจุทีละลูก

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Trabalho num pomar com pereiras e macieiras. Hoje colhi peras e embalei uma por uma.

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मैं नाशपाती और सेब के पेड़ों वाले एक बगीचे में काम करता हूँ। आज, मैंने नाशपाती तोड़ी और उन्हें एक-एक करके पैक किया।

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Armut ve elma ağaçlarının olduğu bir meyve bahçesinde çalışıyorum. Bugün armutları tek tek topladım ve paketledim.

#######

I work in an orchard with pear and apple trees. Today, I picked pears and packed them one by one.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: म नाशपाती र स्याउको रूखको बगैंचामा काम गर्छु। आज, मैले नाशपाती उठाएँ र तिनीहरूलाई एक एक गरेर प्याक गरें।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំ​ធ្វើ​ការ​ក្នុង​ចម្ការ​មួយ​ដែល​មាន​ដើម​ផ្លែ​ប៉ោម និង​ផ្លែ​ប៉ោម។ ថ្ងៃនេះ ខ្ញុំបានរើសផ្លែម្នាស់ ហើយខ្ចប់វាម្តងមួយៗ។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම වැඩ කරන්නේ පෙයාර්ස් සහ ඇපල් ගස් සහිත පළතුරු වත්තක. අද මම පෙයාර්ස් අහුලලා එකින් එක පැක් කළා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি নাশপাতি এবং আপেল গাছ সহ একটি বাগানে কাজ করি। আজ, আমি নাশপাতি বাছাই এবং তাদের এক এক করে প্যাক.
g_text_audio_translate.my: သစ်တော်သီးနဲ့ ပန်းသီးပင်တွေနဲ့ ဥယျာဉ်ခြံတစ်ခုမှာ အလုပ်လုပ်ပါတယ်။ ဒီနေ့တော့ သစ်တော်သီးကို ခူးပြီး တစ်လုံးပြီးတစ်လုံး ထုပ်လိုက်တယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 보통 음식을 만들어서 드세요?
나: 네. 저는 음악을 들으면서 요리하는 것을 좋아해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Anh thường nấu ăn rồi ăn sao?
B: Vâng. Tôi thích vừa nghe nhạc vừa nấu ăn.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Di solito cucini e mangi?
B Sì. Mi piace cucinare ascoltando musica.

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Cuisinez-vous et mangez-vous habituellement ?
B : Oui. J'aime cuisiner en écoutant de la musique.

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: ¿Cocinas y comes habitualmente?
B: Sí. Me gusta cocinar mientras escucho música.

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Apakah Anda biasanya memasak dan makan?
B: Ya. Saya suka memasak sambil mendengarkan musik.

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A: 普段は料理をして食べますか。
B: はい。音楽を聴きながら料理をするのが好きです。

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
A: Kochen und essen Sie normalerweise?
B: Ja. Ich koche gerne, während ich Musik höre.

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A：你平时做饭吃饭吗？
乙：是的。我喜欢边听音乐边做饭。

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A：你平時做飯吃飯嗎？
乙：是的。我喜歡邊聽音樂邊做飯。

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
А: Ты обычно готовишь и ешь?
Б: Да. Я люблю готовить, слушая музыку.

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
A: ปกติคุณทำอาหารและทานอาหารมั้ย?
B: ใช่. ฉันชอบทำอาหารไปพร้อมกับฟังเพลง

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
A: Você costuma cozinhar e comer?
B: Sim. Gosto de cozinhar enquanto ouço música.

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: क्या आप आमतौर पर खाना बनाते और खाते हैं?
बी: हाँ. मुझे संगीत सुनते हुए खाना बनाना पसंद है।

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
A: Genellikle yemek pişirip yer misiniz?
B: Evet. Müzik dinlerken yemek yapmayı seviyorum.

#######

A: Do you usually cook and eat?
B: Yes. I like to cook while listening to music.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: के तपाई सामान्यतया पकाएर खानुहुन्छ?
B: हो। संगीत सुन्दा खाना पकाउन मन लाग्छ ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ចម្លើយ៖ តើអ្នកតែងតែចំអិន និងញ៉ាំទេ?
ខ៖ បាទ។ ខ្ញុំចូលចិត្តធ្វើម្ហូបពេលកំពុងស្តាប់តន្ត្រី។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
පිළිතුර: ඔබ සාමාන්‍යයෙන් උයලා කනවාද?
B: ඔව්. මම සංගීතයට සවන් දෙමින් ආහාර පිසීමට කැමතියි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তরঃ আপনি কি সাধারণত রান্না করে খান?
বি: হ্যাঁ। গান শোনার সাথে সাথে আমি রান্না করতে পছন্দ করি।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
A: မင်းက ဟင်းချက်စားလေ့ရှိလား။
B: ဟုတ်ကဲ့။ သီချင်းနားထောင်ရင်း ဟင်းချက်ရတာကြိုက်တယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 제 직업은 경찰관입니다. 출퇴근 시간에는 교통정리를 합니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Nghề nghiệp của tôi là cảnh sát. Tôi quản lý giao thông vào giờ đi làm và tan làm.
g_text_audio_translate.en: My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Il mio lavoro è un agente di polizia. Controllo il traffico durante le ore di pendolarismo.

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Mon métier est policier. Je contrôle la circulation pendant les heures de trajet.

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mi trabajo es un oficial de policía. Controlo el tráfico durante las horas de trayecto.

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pekerjaan saya adalah seorang polisi. Saya mengontrol lalu lintas selama jam perjalanan.

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私の仕事は警察官です。通勤時間帯の交通整理をしています。

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mein Beruf ist Polizist. Ich kontrolliere den Verkehr während der Pendelzeiten.

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我的工作是一名警察。我在上下班时间控制交通。

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我的工作是一名警察。我在上下班時間控制交通。

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Моя работа – полицейский. Я контролирую движение во время поездок на работу.

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
งานของฉันคือเจ้าหน้าที่ตำรวจ ฉันควบคุมการจราจรในช่วงเวลาเดินทาง

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Meu trabalho é policial. Eu controlo o trânsito durante o horário de deslocamento.

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मेरी नौकरी पुलिस अधिकारी की है. मैं आवागमन के घंटों के दौरान यातायात को नियंत्रित करता हूँ।

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Mesleğim polis memuru. İşe gidip gelme saatlerinde trafiği kontrol ediyorum.

#######

My job is a police officer. I control traffic during commuting hours.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मेरो काम प्रहरीको हो । म यात्राको समयमा ट्राफिक नियन्त्रण गर्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ការងាររបស់ខ្ញុំគឺប៉ូលីស។ ខ្ញុំគ្រប់គ្រងចរាចរណ៍ក្នុងអំឡុងពេលម៉ោងធ្វើដំណើរ។

general.g_text_audio:
가: 지금 몇 시예요?
나: 열두 시입니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Bây giờ là mấy giờ?
B: Mười hai giờ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
R: Che ore sono adesso?
B: Sono le dodici.

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Quelle heure est-il maintenant ?
B : Il est midi.

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
R: ¿Qué hora es ahora?
B: Son las doce.

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Jam berapa sekarang?
B: Sekarang jam dua belas.

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A:今何時ですか。
B: 十二時です。

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.de:

B: Es ist zwölf Uhr.

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:

B：十二点了。

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A: 現在幾點了？
B：十二點了。

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:

Б: Сейчас двенадцать часов.

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ก: ตอนนี้กี่โมงแล้ว?

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:

B: São doze horas.

#######

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:

B: Saat on iki.

A: What time is it now?
B: It's twelve o'clock.

B: बाह्र बजेको छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
A: តើម៉ោងប៉ុន្មានហើយ?
ខ៖ ម៉ោង ១២ ហើយ។

g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উঃ এখন কয়টা বাজে?
বি: বারোটা বেজে গেছে।

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 등산하는 것을 좋아합니다. 땀을 흘리면서 산에 오르면 기분이 좋아집니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tôi thích leo núi. Vừa leo núi vừa đổ mồ hôi khiến tâm trạng tôi tốt hơn.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Mi piace scalare le montagne. Scalare la montagna sudando mi fa sentire meglio.

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
J'aime escalader des montagnes. Escalader la montagne en transpirant me fait me sentir mieux.

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Me gusta escalar montañas. Subir la montaña sudando me hace sentir mejor.

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya suka mendaki gunung. Mendaki gunung sambil berkeringat membuat saya merasa lebih baik.

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私は山に登るのが好きです。汗をかきながら山に登ると気分が良くなります。

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Ich mag es, Berge zu besteigen. Wenn ich schwitzend den Berg erklimme, fühle ich mich besser.

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我喜欢爬山。一边流汗一边爬山，心情会好很多。

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我喜歡爬山。一邊流汗一邊爬山，心情會好很多。

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мне нравится лазить по горам. Поднимаясь на гору, потея, я чувствую себя лучше.

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ฉันชอบปีนเขา การปีนเขาในขณะที่เหงื่อออกทำให้ฉันรู้สึกดีขึ้น

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Gosto de escalar montanhas. Subir a montanha suando me faz sentir melhor.

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मुझे पहाड़ों पर चढ़ना पसंद है. पसीना बहाते हुए पहाड़ पर चढ़ने से मुझे बेहतर महसूस होता है।

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Dağlara tırmanmayı seviyorum. Terleyerek dağa tırmanmak kendimi daha iyi hissetmemi sağlıyor.

#######

I like climbing mountains. Climbing the mountain while sweating makes me feel better.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मलाई हिमाल चढ्न मन पर्छ । पसिना बगाउँदा पहाड चढ्दा राम्रो महसुस हुन्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំចូលចិត្តឡើងភ្នំ។ ការឡើងភ្នំពេលបែកញើសធ្វើឱ្យខ្ញុំមានអារម្មណ៍ធូរស្រាល។

나: 저는 자동차 공장에서 자동차를 만드는 일을 해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Xin lỗi nhưng nghề nghiệp của anh là gì?
B: Tôi làm công việc sản xuất ô tô ở nhà máy ô tô.

g_text_audio_translate.it:
