B: Lavoro in una fabbrica di automobili che produce automobili.

B: I work in a car factory making cars.

#######

B: I work in a car factory making cars.
g_text_audio_translate.th:

B: ฉันทำงานในโรงงานผลิตรถยนต์เพื่อผลิตรถยนต์

#######

B: I work in a car factory making cars.

B: Eu trabalho em uma fábrica de automóveis, fabricando carros.

B: I work in a car factory making cars.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: क्षमा करें, आपका काम क्या है?
बी: मैं कार बनाने वाली एक कार फैक्ट्री में काम करता हूं।

#######

A: Excuse me, what is your job?
B: I work in a car factory making cars.

B: Araba üreten bir araba fabrikasında çalışıyorum.

#######

A: Excuse me, what is your job?
B: I work in a car factory making cars.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: माफ गर्नुहोस्, तपाईको काम के हो?
B: म कार बनाउने कारखानामा काम गर्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ចម្លើយ៖ សុំទោស តើការងាររបស់អ្នកជាអ្វី?
ខ៖ ខ្ញុំធ្វើការនៅរោងចក្រផលិតរថយន្ត។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
A: සමාවෙන්න, ඔබේ රැකියාව කුමක්ද?
B: මම කාර් කර්මාන්ත ශාලාවක කාර් හදන වැඩ කරනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তরঃ মাফ করবেন, আপনার কাজ কি?
বি: আমি একটি গাড়ি তৈরির কারখানায় কাজ করি।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
A: ခွင့်လွှတ်ပါ၊ မင်းအလုပ်ကဘာလဲ။
B: ကျွန်တော် ကားထုတ်လုပ်တဲ့ စက်ရုံမှာ အလုပ်လုပ်ပါတယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 기분이 안 좋을 때 음악을 들어요. 누워서 눈을 감고 음악을 들으면 마음이 편안해져요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Khi tâm trạng không tốt tôi sẽ nghe nhạc. Khi nằm xuống và nghe nhạc tôi thấy lòng mình bình yên hơn.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Ascolto musica quando sono di cattivo umore. Stare sdraiato con gli occhi chiusi e ascoltare la musica mi fa sentire a mio agio.

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
J'écoute de la musique quand je suis de mauvaise humeur. M'allonger les yeux fermés et écouter de la musique me met à l'aise.

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Escucho música cuando estoy de mal humor. Acostarme con los ojos cerrados y escuchar música me hace sentir a gusto.

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya mendengarkan musik ketika suasana hati saya sedang buruk. Berbaring dengan mata tertutup dan mendengarkan musik membuat saya merasa nyaman.

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
機嫌が悪いときは音楽を聴きます。目を閉じて横になって音楽を聴くと、心が落ち着きます。

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Ich höre Musik, wenn ich schlechte Laune habe. Wenn ich mich mit geschlossenen Augen hinlege und Musik höre, fühle ich mich wohl.

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我心情不好的时候听音乐。闭着眼睛躺着听音乐让我心情舒畅。

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我心情不好的時候聽音樂。閉著眼睛躺著聽音樂讓我心情舒暢。

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Я слушаю музыку, когда у меня плохое настроение. Лежа с закрытыми глазами и слушая музыку, я чувствую себя непринужденно.

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ฉันฟังเพลงเมื่อฉันอารมณ์ไม่ดี การนอนหลับตาและฟังเพลงทำให้ฉันรู้สึกสบายใจ

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Ouço música quando estou de mau humor. Deitar com os olhos fechados e ouvir música me deixa à vontade.

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
जब मेरा मूड खराब होता है तो मैं संगीत सुनता हूं। आंखें बंद करके लेटने और संगीत सुनने से मुझे आराम महसूस होता है।

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Moralim bozuk olduğunda müzik dinlerim. Gözlerim kapalı uzanıp müzik dinlemek beni rahatlatıyor.

#######

I listen to music when I'm in a bad mood. Lying down with my eyes closed and listening to music makes me feel at ease.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: म खराब मुडमा हुँदा संगीत सुन्छु। आँखा बन्द गरेर सुत्दा र संगीत सुन्दा मलाई आराम महसुस हुन्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំស្តាប់តន្ត្រីនៅពេលខ្ញុំមានអារម្មណ៍មិនល្អ។ ការ​ដេក​ដោយ​បិទ​ភ្នែក ហើយ​ស្តាប់​តន្ត្រី​ធ្វើ​ឱ្យ​ខ្ញុំ​មាន​អារម្មណ៍​ធូរស្រាល។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම නරක මනෝභාවයකින් සිටින විට මම සංගීතයට සවන් දෙමි. දෑස් පියාගෙන බිම වැතිර සංගීතයට සවන් දීමෙන් මට සැහැල්ලුවක් දැනේ.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমার মেজাজ খারাপ হলে আমি গান শুনি। চোখ বন্ধ করে শুয়ে গান শুনলে আরাম লাগে।

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 내일은 무슨 일을 해야 합니까?
나: 내일은 논에 농약을 쳐야 해요. 요새 벌레가 많아졌거든요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Ngày mai chúng ta phải làm gì?
B: Mai chúng ta phải phun thuốc sâu trên ruộng. Vì dạo này có nhiều sâu bọ hơn.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: What do we have to do tomorrow?
B: We have to spray pesticide to the rice paddies tomorrow. Because there are a lot of bugs these days.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Cosa dobbiamo fare domani?
B: Domani dobbiamo spruzzare pesticidi sulle risaie. Perché ci sono molti bug in questi giorni.

#######

A: What do we have to do tomorrow?
B: We have to spray pesticide to the rice paddies tomorrow. Because there are a lot of bugs these days.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Que devons-nous faire demain ?
B : Nous devons pulvériser des pesticides sur les rizières demain. Parce qu'il y a beaucoup de bugs de nos jours.

#######

A: What do we have to do tomorrow?
B: We have to spray pesticide to the rice paddies tomorrow. Because there are a lot of bugs these days.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: ¿Qué tenemos que hacer mañana?
B: Tenemos que rociar pesticida a los arrozales mañana. Porque hay muchos errores en estos días.

#######

A: What do we have to do tomorrow?
B: We have to spray pesticide to the rice paddies tomorrow. Because there are a lot of bugs these days.

B: Kami harus menyemprotkan pestisida ke sawah besok. Karena banyak bug hari ini.

#######

A: What do we have to do tomorrow?
B: We have to spray pesticide to the rice paddies tomorrow. Because there are a lot of bugs these days.

B: 明日、田んぼに農薬を散布しなければなりません。最近はバグが多いから。

#######

A: What do we have to do tomorrow?
B: We have to spray pesticide to the rice paddies tomorrow. Because there are a lot of bugs these days.

B: Wir müssen morgen Pestizid auf die Reisfelder sprühen. Weil es heutzutage viele Bugs gibt.

A: What do we have to do tomorrow?
B: We have to spray pesticide to the rice paddies tomorrow. Because there are a lot of bugs these days.

B: 明天我们得给稻田喷洒农药。因为现在有很多错误。

g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: हामीले भोलि के गर्नुपर्छ?
ख: भोलि धानबालीमा विषादी छर्काउनुपर्छ। किनभने आजकल त्यहाँ धेरै बगहरू छन्।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ចម្លើយ៖ តើ​យើង​ត្រូវ​ធ្វើ​អ្វី​នៅ​ថ្ងៃ​ស្អែក?
ខ៖ យើង​ត្រូវ​បាញ់​ថ្នាំ​សម្លាប់​សត្វ​ល្អិត​ដល់​ស្រែ​នៅ​ថ្ងៃ​ស្អែក។ ព្រោះ​សព្វ​ថ្ងៃ​នេះ​មាន​បញ្ហា​ច្រើន​ណាស់។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
පිළිතුර: හෙට අපි මොනවද කරන්න ඕන?
ආ.. හෙට හාල්වලට කෘමිනාශක ඉසීමට වෙනවා. මොකද මේ දවස්වල බග් ගොඩක් තියෙනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তরঃ আগামীকাল আমাদের কি করতে হবে?
বিঃদ্রঃ আগামীকাল আমাদের ধানের শীষে কীটনাশক স্প্রে করতে হবে। কারণ এই দিনগুলিতে প্রচুর বাগ রয়েছে।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
A: မနက်ဖြန် ဘာလုပ်ရမလဲ။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 실례지만 무슨 일 하세요?
여자: 요리사예요. 주방에서 음식을 만드는 일을 해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Xin lỗi, nhưng bạn đang công việc gì?
Nữ: Tôi là một đầu bếp. Tôi làm việc công việc chế biến thức ăn trong nhà bếp.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Mi scusi, cosa sta facendo?
Donna: Sono una cuoca. Preparo il cibo in cucina.

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Excusez-moi, qu'est-ce que vous faites ?
Femme : Je suis cuisinière. Je fais de la nourriture dans la cuisine.

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Disculpe, ¿qué está haciendo?
Mujer: Soy cocinera. Hago la comida en la cocina.

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Permisi, apa yang kamu lakukan?
Wanita: Saya seorang juru masak. Saya membuat makanan di dapur.

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: すみません、何をしているのですか?
女：私は料理人です。キッチンで料理を作っています。

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Entschuldigung, was machst du?
Frau: Ich bin Köchin. Ich mache Essen in der Küche.

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：打扰一下，你在做什么？
女：我是厨师。我在厨房做饭。

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：打擾一下，你在做什麼？
女：我是廚師。我在廚房做飯。

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Простите, что вы делаете?
Женщина: Я повар. Я готовлю еду на кухне.

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ขอโทษครับ คุณกำลังทำอะไรอยู่?
ผู้หญิง: ฉันเป็นแม่ครัว ฉันทำอาหารในครัว

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Com licença, o que você está fazendo?
Mulher: Sou cozinheira. Faço comida na cozinha.

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: क्षमा करें, आप क्या कर रहे हैं?
महिला: मैं एक रसोइया हूं. मैं रसोई में खाना बनाती हूं.

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Afedersiniz, ne yapıyorsunuz?
Kadın: Ben aşçıyım. Mutfakta yemek yapıyorum.

#######

Man: Excuse me, what are you doing?
Woman: I'm a cook. I make food in the kitchen.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मान्छे: माफ गर, के गर्दै छौ ?
महिला: म एक भान्सा हुँ। भान्सामा खाना बनाउँछु ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ សុំទោស ឯងកំពុងធ្វើអ្វី?
ស្ត្រី៖ ខ្ញុំជាចុងភៅ។ ខ្ញុំធ្វើម្ហូបនៅក្នុងផ្ទះបាយ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: සමාවෙන්න, ඔබ මොකද කරන්නේ?
කාන්තාව: මම කෝකියෙක්. මම කුස්සියේ කෑම හදනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: মাফ করবেন, আপনি কি করছেন?
মহিলাঃ আমি একজন বাবুর্চি। আমি রান্নাঘরে খাবার তৈরি করি।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man: ခွင့်လွှတ်ပါ၊ မင်းဘာလုပ်တာလဲ။
အမျိုးသမီး : ငါက ထမင်းချက်။ ကျွန်တော် မီးဖိုချောင်မှာ ထမင်းလုပ်တယ်။

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 지수 씨, 주말에 뭐하고 지냈어요? 
여자: 오랜만에 친구하고 테니스를 쳤어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Ji Su, bạn đã làm gì vào cuối tuần?
Nữ: Lâu rồi tôi mới chơi quần vợt với bạn tôi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:

g_text_audio_translate.ne:

महिला: मैले मेरो साथीसँग लामो समय पछि टेनिस खेले।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ Ji Su តើអ្នកបានធ្វើអ្វីនៅថ្ងៃចុងសប្តាហ៍?
ស្ត្រី៖ ខ្ញុំ​បាន​លេង​កីឡា​វាយ​កូន​បាល់​ជាមួយ​មិត្ត​ភក្តិ​របស់​ខ្ញុំ​ជា​យូរ​មក​ហើយ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: ජී සු, සති අන්තයේ ඔබ කළේ කුමක්ද?
කාන්තාව: මම මගේ මිතුරා සමඟ ටෙනිස් ක්‍රීඩා කළේ බොහෝ කාලයකට පසුවය.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মানুষ: জি সু, আপনি সপ্তাহান্তে কি করেছেন?
মহিলাঃ অনেকদিন পর বন্ধুর সাথে টেনিস খেললাম।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man: Ji Su ၊ တနင်္ဂနွေမှာ မင်းဘာလုပ်ခဲ့လဲ။
အမျိုးသမီး- အချိန်အတော်ကြာပြီးနောက် သူငယ်ချင်းနဲ့ တင်းနစ်ကစားခဲ့တယ်။

남자: 어제 저녁에 뭐 하셨어요?
여자: 친구들하고 노래방에 가서 노래를 불렀어요. 아주 재미있었어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Bạn đã làm gì vào tối hôm qua?
Nữ: Tôi đến phòng karaoke hát với bạn bè. Rất là vui.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What did you do last night?
Woman: I went to karaoke with my friends and sang. It was really fun.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Cos'hai fatto ieri sera?
Donna: sono andata al karaoke con i miei amici e ho cantato. È stato davvero divertente.

#######

Man: What did you do last night?
Woman: I went to karaoke with my friends and sang. It was really fun.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Femme : Je suis allée au karaoké avec mes amis et j'ai chanté. C'était vraiment amusant.

#######

Man: What did you do last night?
Woman: I went to karaoke with my friends and sang. It was really fun.

នារី៖ ខ្ញុំបានទៅខារ៉ាអូខេជាមួយមិត្តភក្តិ ហើយច្រៀង។ វាពិតជាសប្បាយណាស់។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: ඔබ ඊයේ රෑ මොකද කළේ?
කාන්තාව: මම මගේ යාළුවොත් එක්ක කැරෝකේ ගිහින් සින්දු කිව්වා. ඇත්තෙන්ම එය විනෝදජනක.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: কাল রাতে তুমি কি করেছিলে?
মহিলা: আমি আমার বন্ধুদের সাথে কারাওকে গিয়েছিলাম এবং গান গেয়েছিলাম। ইহা সত্যিই রসিকতা ছিল.
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man : မနေ့ညက ဘာလာလုပ်တာလဲ။
အမျိုးသမီး- သူငယ်ချင်းတွေနဲ့ ကာရာအိုကေသွားပြီးတော့ သီချင်းဆိုဖြစ်တယ်။ တကယ့်ကို ပျော်စရာကောင်းခဲ့ပါတယ်။

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 어제도 바빴어?
남자: 공장에서 기계가 고장나서 그걸 고치느라고 정신이 없었어.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Hôm qua bạn cũng bận à?
Nam: Máy ở nhà máy bị hỏng nên tôi bận sửa nó.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Eri impegnato ieri?
Uomo: Una macchina si è guastata in fabbrica e io ero impegnato a ripararla.

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Étiez-vous occupée hier ?
Homme : Une machine est tombée en panne à l'usine et j'étais occupé à la réparer.

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Estuviste ocupado ayer?
Hombre: Una máquina se descompuso en la fábrica y yo estaba ocupado arreglándola.

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apakah Anda sibuk kemarin?
Pria: Sebuah mesin rusak di pabrik dan saya sedang sibuk memperbaikinya.

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：昨日は忙しかったですか。
男性：工場で機械が故障して、修理に追われていました。

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Warst du gestern beschäftigt?
Mann: Eine Maschine ist in der Fabrik kaputt gegangen und ich war damit beschäftigt, sie zu reparieren.

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：你昨天忙吗？
男：工厂里有台机器坏了，我正忙着修呢。

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：你昨天忙嗎？
男：工廠裡有台機器壞了，我正忙著修呢。

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Ты был занят вчера?
Мужчина: На заводе сломалась машина, и я был занят ее починкой.

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: เมื่อวานคุณยุ่งไหม?
ผู้ชาย: เครื่องจักรพังที่โรงงาน และฉันยุ่งอยู่กับการซ่อมแซม

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Você estava ocupado ontem?
Homem: Uma máquina quebrou na fábrica e eu estava ocupado consertando-a.

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या तुम कल व्यस्त थे?
आदमी: फैक्ट्री में एक मशीन खराब हो गई और मैं उसे ठीक करने में व्यस्त था।

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Dün meşgul müydün?
Adam: Fabrikada bir makine bozuldu ve ben onu tamir etmekle meşguldüm.

#######

Woman: Were you busy yesterday?
Man: A machine broke down at the factory and I was busy fixing it.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला : हिजो व्यस्त हुनुहुन्थ्यो ?
मान्छे: कारखानामा मेसिन बिग्रियो र म यसलाई मिलाउन व्यस्त थिएँ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
នារី៖ ម្សិលមិញរវល់មែនទេ?
បុរស៖ ម៉ាស៊ីន​មួយ​ខូច​នៅ​រោងចក្រ ហើយ​ខ្ញុំ​រវល់​ជួសជុល​វា។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: ඔබ ඊයේ කාර්යබහුලද?
මිනිසා: කම්හලේ යන්ත්‍රයක් කැඩිලා මම ඒක හදන්න කාර්යබහුල වුණා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলাঃ তুমি কি গতকাল ব্যস্ত ছিলে?
মানুষ: কারখানায় একটা মেশিন নষ্ট হয়ে গেছে আর আমি সেটা ঠিক করতে ব্যস্ত ছিলাম।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
အမျိုးသမီး : မနေ့က အလုပ်များနေလား။
Man: စက်ရုံမှာ စက်ပျက်လို့ ပြင်ရတာ အလုပ်ရှုပ်နေတယ်။

기계: Máy móc
고치다: Sửa chữa
정신없다: Bận rộn

V/A + 아/어서: Vì.

3. 
4. 
--------------------
<g>기계:</g> Machine
<g>고치다:</g> To fix
<g>정신없다:</g> To be busy
<g>고장나다:</g> To be broken

<g>V/A + 아/어서:</g> Because of, so that…
<g>V + 느라고:</g> Because, due to (give a reason for a negative consequence).

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 퇴근 후에 뭐 하세요?
여자: 수영장에 가서 수영을 배워요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Bạn làm gì sau giờ làm việc?
Nữ: Tôi đến hồ bơi và học bơi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Cosa fai dopo il lavoro?
Donna: vado in piscina e imparo a nuotare.

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Que faites-vous après le travail ?
Femme : Je vais à la piscine et j'apprends à nager.

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Qué haces después del trabajo?
Mujer: Voy a la piscina y aprendo a nadar.

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apa yang Anda lakukan setelah bekerja?
Wanita: Saya pergi ke kolam renang dan belajar berenang.

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：仕事の後は何をしますか。
女：プールに行って泳ぎを習います。

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Was machst du nach der Arbeit?
Frau: Ich gehe ins Schwimmbad und lerne schwimmen.

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：下班后做什么？
女：我去游泳池学游泳。

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：下班後做什麼？
女：我去游泳池學游泳。

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Что ты делаешь после работы?
Женщина: Я хожу в бассейн и учусь плавать.

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : หลังเลิกงานคุณทำอะไร?
ผู้หญิง: ฉันไปสระว่ายน้ำและเรียนว่ายน้ำ

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: O que você faz depois do trabalho?
Mulher: Vou para piscina e aprendo a nadar.

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: काम के बाद क्या करते हो?
महिला: मैं पूल में जाकर तैरना सीखती हूं।

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: İşten sonra ne yaparsın?
Kadın: Havuza gidip yüzmeyi öğreniyorum.

#######

Man: What do you do after work?
Woman: I go to the pool and learn to swim.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मान्छे : काम पछि के गर्छौ ?
महिला: म पोखरीमा गएर पौडी खेल्न सिक्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ តើអ្នកធ្វើអ្វីបន្ទាប់ពីធ្វើការ?
ស្ត្រី៖ ខ្ញុំទៅអាងហែលទឹក ហើយរៀនហែលទឹក។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: රැකියාවෙන් පසු ඔබ කරන්නේ කුමක්ද?
කාන්තාව: මම පොකුණට ගිහින් පිහිනන්න ඉගෙන ගන්නවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: কাজ শেষে কি করেন?
মহিলাঃ আমি পুলে গিয়ে সাঁতার শিখি।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man : အလုပ်ပြီးရင် ဘာလုပ်မလဲ။
အမျိုးသမီး : ငါ ရေကူးကန်သွားပြီး ရေကူးတတ်တယ် ။

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 공구를 수리할 때 제일 먼저 무엇을 해야 해요?
남자: 수리를 시작하기 전에 먼저 플러그를 뽑아서 전원을 차단해야 돼요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Phải làm gì đầu tiên khi sửa chữa một thiết bị?
Nam: Trước khi bắt đầu sửa chữa, phải rút phích cắm để cắt điện trước.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Cosa dovremmo fare prima quando ripariamo gli strumenti?
Uomo: Prima di iniziare le riparazioni, devi prima scollegare l'alimentazione scollegandola.

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Que devons-nous faire en premier lors de la réparation d'outils ?
Homme : Avant de commencer les réparations, vous devez d'abord couper l'alimentation en le débranchant.

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Qué debemos hacer primero al reparar herramientas?
Hombre: Antes de comenzar las reparaciones, primero debe desconectar la alimentación desenchufándola.

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apa yang harus kita lakukan pertama kali saat memperbaiki alat?
Pria: Sebelum memulai perbaikan, Anda harus terlebih dahulu memutuskan daya dengan mencabutnya.

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：道具を修理するとき、まず何をすればいいですか？
男性: 修理を始める前に、まずプラグを抜いて電源を切断する必要があります。

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Was sollen wir zuerst tun, wenn wir Werkzeuge reparieren?
Mann: Bevor Sie mit der Reparatur beginnen, müssen Sie zuerst die Stromversorgung trennen, indem Sie den Stecker ziehen.

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：修工具首先要做什么？
男：在开始维修之前，必须先拔掉电源以断开电源。

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：修工具首先要做什麼？
男：在開始維修之前，必須先拔掉電源以斷開電源。

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Что нам следует делать в первую очередь при ремонте инструментов?
Мужчина: Прежде чем приступить к ремонту, необходимо сначала отключить питание, вытащив его из розетки.

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: เราควรทำอะไรเป็นอันดับแรกเมื่อซ่อมเครื่องมือ?
ชาย: ก่อนเริ่มการซ่อมแซม คุณต้องถอดสายไฟออกก่อนโดยถอดปลั๊กออก

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: O que devemos fazer primeiro ao consertar ferramentas?
Homem: Antes de iniciar os reparos, você deve primeiro desligar a energia desconectando-a da tomada.

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: औज़ारों की मरम्मत करते समय हमें सबसे पहले क्या करना चाहिए?
आदमी: मरम्मत शुरू करने से पहले, आपको पहले बिजली का प्लग निकालकर डिस्कनेक्ट करना होगा।

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Aletleri tamir ederken ilk önce ne yapmalıyız?
Adam: Onarımlara başlamadan önce, öncelikle fişi prizden çekerek elektriği kesmeniz gerekir.

#######

Woman: What should we do first when repairing tools?
Man: Before starting repairs, you must first disconnect the power by unplugging it.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला: औजार मर्मत गर्दा पहिले के गर्नुपर्छ?
मान्छे: मर्मत सुरु गर्नु अघि, तपाईंले पहिले यसलाई अनप्लग गरेर पावर विच्छेद गर्नुपर्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ តើយើងត្រូវធ្វើអ្វីមុនគេនៅពេលជួសជុលឧបករណ៍?
បុរស៖ មុននឹងចាប់ផ្តើមជួសជុល អ្នកត្រូវតែផ្តាច់ភ្លើងជាមុនសិន ដោយដកខ្សែចេញ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: මෙවලම් අලුත්වැඩියා කිරීමේදී අප මුලින්ම කළ යුත්තේ කුමක්ද?
මිනිසා: අලුත්වැඩියා කිරීම ආරම්භ කිරීමට පෙර, ඔබ එය විසන්ධි කිරීමෙන් විදුලිය විසන්ධි කළ යුතුය.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলা: সরঞ্জাম মেরামত করার সময় আমাদের প্রথমে কী করা উচিত?
মানুষ: মেরামত শুরু করার আগে, আপনাকে প্রথমে এটি আনপ্লাগ করে পাওয়ার সংযোগ বিচ্ছিন্ন করতে হবে।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
အမျိုးသမီး- ကိရိယာတွေကို ပြုပြင်တဲ့အခါ အရင်ဆုံး ဘာလုပ်သင့်လဲ။
Man- ပြုပြင်မှုမစတင်မီ၊ ပလတ်ဖြုတ်ခြင်းဖြင့် ပါဝါကို ဦးစွာဖြုတ်ရပါမည်။

2. पहिले अनप्लग गर्नुहोस्
3. कुनै ज्वलनशील पदार्थहरू छैनन्!
4. पावर बन्द! काम पछि, बत्तीहरू बन्द गर्न निश्चित हुनुहोस्।
----------------------------------
<g>플러그:</g> इलेक्ट्रिक प्लग
<g>뽑다:</g> तान्नु

<g>V + 기 전에:</g> पहिले।
explain.km:
1. ពាក់ឧបករណ៍ការពារ - ខ្យល់ចេញចូលពេញលេញ - ហត់នឿយដោយផ្នែក
2. ដកដោតចេញជាមុនសិន
3. គ្មានសារធាតុងាយឆេះ!
4. បិទភ្លើង! បន្ទាប់ពីធ្វើការត្រូវប្រាកដថាបិទភ្លើង។
--------------------
<g>플러그៖</g> ដោតអគ្គិសនី
<g>뽑다:</g> ដើម្បីទាញ

<g>V + 기 전에:</g> មុន
explain.si:
1. ආරක්ෂිත ආම්පන්න පැළඳීම - සම්පූර්ණ වාතාශ්රය - අර්ධ පිටාර ගැලීම
2. මුලින්ම Unplug කරන්න
3. ගිනිගන්නා ද්‍රව්‍ය නැත!
4. විදුලිය විසන්ධි කරන්න! වැඩ කිරීමෙන් පසු, විදුලි පහන් නිවා දැමීමට වග බලා ගන්න.
----------------------
<g>플러그:</g> විදුලි පේනුව
<g>뽑다:</g> අදින්න

<g>V + 기 전에:</g> පෙර.
explain.bn:
1. প্রতিরক্ষামূলক গিয়ার পরা - সম্পূর্ণ বায়ুচলাচল - আংশিক নিষ্কাশন
2. প্রথমে আনপ্লাগ করুন
3. কোন দাহ্য পদার্থ নেই!
4. পাওয়ার বন্ধ! কাজের পরে, লাইট বন্ধ করতে ভুলবেন না।
------------------
<g>플러그:</g> বৈদ্যুতিক প্লাগ
<g>뽑다:</g> টানতে

<g>V + 기 전에:</g> আগে।
explain.my:
1. အကာအကွယ် ဂီယာ ဝတ်ဆင်ခြင်း - လေဝင်လေထွက် အပြည့် - တစ်စိတ်တစ်ပိုင်း အိတ်ဇော
2. ဦးစွာ ပလပ်ဖြုတ်ပါ။
3. မီးလောင်လွယ်သော အရာများ မရှိပါ။
4. ပါဝါပိတ်ပါ။ အလုပ်ပြီးရင် မီးကို သေချာပိတ်ပါ။
--------------------
<g>플러그:</g> လျှပ်စစ်ပလပ်
<g>뽑다:</g> ဆွဲရန်

<g>V + 기 전에:</g> အရင်က။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 우리 사무실 사람들은 모두 여덟시 반에 출근을 합니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tất cả mọi người trong văn phòng của chúng tôi đi làm lúc tám giờ rưỡi.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Tutti nel nostro ufficio vanno a lavorare alle 8:30.

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Tout le monde dans notre bureau se met au travail à 8h30.

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.

Todos en nuestra oficina van a trabajar a las 8:30.

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Semua orang di kantor kami pergi bekerja pada jam 8:30.

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私たちのオフィスでは、全員が 8 時 30 分に出勤します。

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Jeder in unserem Büro geht um 8:30 Uhr zur Arbeit.

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我们办公室的每个人都在 8:30 上班。

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我們辦公室的每個人都在 8:30 上班。

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Все в нашем офисе идут на работу в 8:30.

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ทุกคนในออฟฟิศของเราไปทำงานเวลา 8.30 น.

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Todos em nosso escritório vão trabalhar às 8h30.

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
हमारे ऑफिस में सभी लोग 8:30 बजे काम पर चले जाते हैं।

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Ofisimizde herkes 8:30'da işe gidiyor.

#######

Everyone in our office goes to work at 8:30.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: हाम्रो अफिसका सबैजना 8:30 मा काममा जान्छन्।
g_text_audio_translate.km: អ្នក​រាល់​គ្នា​នៅ​ការិយាល័យ​របស់​យើង​ទៅ​ធ្វើ​ការ​នៅ​ម៉ោង ៨:៣០។
g_text_audio_translate.si: අපේ ඔෆිස් එකේ හැමෝම වැඩට යන්නේ 8.30ට.

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 제 취미는 탁구입니다. 1년전에 처음으로 탁구 치는 것을 배웠는데 요즘은 꽤 잘합니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Sở thích của tôi là bóng bàn. Lần đầu tiên tôi học chơi bóng bàn là cách đây một năm, và dạo này tôi chơi khá giỏi.
g_text_audio_translate.en: My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Il mio hobby è giocare a ping pong. Ho imparato a giocare a ping pong per la prima volta un anno fa e ora sono piuttosto bravo.

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Mon passe-temps est de jouer au tennis de table. J'ai appris à jouer au tennis de table pour la première fois il y a un an, et maintenant je le fais plutôt bien.

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mi hobby es jugar al tenis de mesa. Aprendí a jugar tenis de mesa por primera vez hace un año y ahora soy bastante bueno en eso.

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Hobi saya adalah bermain tenis meja. Saya belajar bermain tenis meja untuk pertama kalinya setahun yang lalu, dan sekarang saya cukup mahir.

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私の趣味は卓球をすることです。 1年前に初めて卓球を習いましたが、今ではかなり上手です。

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mein Hobby ist Tischtennis spielen. Ich habe vor einem Jahr zum ersten Mal Tischtennis gelernt und bin jetzt ziemlich gut darin.

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我的爱好是打乒乓球。一年前我第一次学打乒乓球，现在打得还不错。

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我的愛好是打乒乓球。一年前我第一次學打乒乓球，現在打得還不錯。

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мое хобби – игра в настольный теннис. Я впервые научился играть в настольный теннис год назад и сейчас у меня это неплохо получается.

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
งานอดิเรกของฉันคือเล่นปิงปอง ฉันเรียนรู้การเล่นปิงปองเป็นครั้งแรกเมื่อปีที่แล้ว และตอนนี้ฉันก็ทำได้ดีทีเดียว

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Meu hobby é jogar tênis de mesa. Aprendi a jogar tênis de mesa pela primeira vez há um ano e agora sou muito bom nisso.

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मेरा शौक टेबल टेनिस खेलना है। मैंने एक साल पहले पहली बार टेबल टेनिस खेलना सीखा और अब मैं इसमें काफी अच्छी हो गई हूं।

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Hobim masa tenisi oynamaktır. İlk kez bir yıl önce masa tenisi oynamayı öğrendim ve şimdi bunda oldukça iyiyim.

#######

My hobby is playing table tennis. I learned to play table tennis for the first time a year ago, and now I'm pretty good at it.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मेरो शौक टेबल टेनिस खेल्नु हो। मैले एक वर्ष पहिले पहिलो पटक टेबल टेनिस खेल्न सिकें, र अब म यसमा राम्रो छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ចំណង់ចំណូលចិត្តរបស់ខ្ញុំគឺលេងកីឡាវាយកូនបាល់លើតុ។ ខ្ញុំបានរៀនលេងវាយកូនឃ្លីលើតុជាលើកដំបូងកាលពីមួយឆ្នាំមុន ហើយឥឡូវនេះខ្ញុំពិតជាពូកែណាស់។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මගේ විනෝදාංශය මේස පන්දු ක්‍රීඩා කිරීමයි. මම වසරකට පෙර පළමු වරට මේස පන්දු ක්‍රීඩා කිරීමට ඉගෙන ගත්තෙමි, දැන් මම එයට ඉතා දක්ෂයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমার শখ টেবিল টেনিস খেলা। আমি এক বছর আগে প্রথমবার টেবিল টেনিস খেলতে শিখেছি, এবং এখন আমি এতে বেশ ভালো।
g_text_audio_translate.my: ကျွန်တော့် ဝါသနာက စားပွဲတင် တင်းနစ် ကစားတာ။ လွန်ခဲ့တဲ့တစ်နှစ်လောက်က စားပွဲတင်တင်းနစ်ကစားဖို့ သင်ယူခဲ့ပြီး အခုချိန်မှာတော့ တော်တော်လေးကို ကျွမ်းကျင်လာပါပြီ။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 쇠를 자르는 일을 합니다. 쇠를 자를 때 불꽃이 일어나기 때문에 보안면을 쓰고 안전장갑도 낍니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tôi làm việc để cắt sắt. Vì khi cắt sắt sẽ có tia lửa phát ra nên tôi mang mặt nạ bảo hộ và cả găng tay bảo hộ.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Lavoro nel taglio del ferro. I fuochi d'artificio si verificano durante il taglio del ferro, quindi indosso una visiera di sicurezza e guanti di sicurezza.

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Je travaille dans la découpe du fer. Des feux d'artifice se produisent lors de la coupe du fer, je porte donc un écran facial de sécurité et des gants de sécurité.

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Trabajo en corte de hierro. Los fuegos artificiales ocurren al cortar hierro, por lo que uso careta de seguridad y guantes de seguridad.

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya bekerja di pemotongan besi. Kembang api terjadi saat memotong besi, jadi saya memakai pelindung wajah dan sarung tangan pengaman.

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
鉄を切る仕事をしています。鉄を切ると花火が上がるので、安全フェイスシールドと安全手袋を着用しています。

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Ich arbeite im Eisenschneiden. Feuerwerk entsteht beim Schneiden von Eisen, daher trage ich einen Gesichtsschutz und Schutzhandschuhe.

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我从事切割铁的工作。切割铁时会产生烟花，所以我戴上安全面罩和安全手套。

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我從事切割鐵的工作。切割鐵時會產生煙花，所以我戴上安全面罩和安全手套。

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Я работаю по резке железа. При резке железа случаются фейерверки, поэтому я надеваю защитную маску и защитные перчатки.

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ฉันทำงานเกี่ยวกับการตัดเหล็ก ดอกไม้ไฟเกิดขึ้นเมื่อตัดเหล็ก ฉันจึงสวมอุปกรณ์ป้องกันใบหน้าและถุงมือนิรภัย

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Eu trabalho no corte de ferro. Fogos de artifício ocorrem ao cortar ferro, por isso uso protetor facial e luvas de segurança.

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मैं लोहा काटने का काम करता हूं. लोहा काटते समय आतिशबाजी होती है, इसलिए मैं सुरक्षा फेस शील्ड और सुरक्षा दस्ताने पहनता हूं।

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Demir kesme işinde çalışıyorum. Demiri keserken havai fişekler oluşuyor, bu yüzden koruyucu yüz siperi ve koruyucu eldivenler takıyorum.

#######

I work in cutting iron. Fireworks occur when cutting iron, so I wear safety face shield and safety gloves.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: फलाम काट्ने काम गर्छु । फलाम काट्दा आतिशबाजी हुन्छ, त्यसैले म सुरक्षा अनुहार ढाल र सुरक्षा पन्जा लगाउँछु।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំធ្វើការកាត់ដែក។ កាំជ្រួចកើតឡើងនៅពេលកាត់ដែក ដូច្នេះខ្ញុំពាក់របាំងមុខសុវត្ថិភាព និងស្រោមដៃសុវត្ថិភាព។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම යකඩ කපන වැඩ. යකඩ කපන විට ගිනිකෙළි සිදු වේ, එබැවින් මම ආරක්ෂිත මුහුණු ආවරණ සහ ආරක්ෂිත අත්වැසුම් පැළඳ සිටිමි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি লোহা কাটার কাজ করি। লোহা কাটার সময় আতশবাজি হয়, তাই আমি সুরক্ষা মুখের ঢাল এবং সুরক্ষা গ্লাভস পরি।
g_text_audio_translate.my: ကျွန်တော်က သံဖြတ်အလုပ် လုပ်တယ်။ မီးပန်းသံဖြတ်သည့်အခါတွင် မီးရှူးမီးပန်းများ ထွက်ပေါ်လာသောကြောင့် ကျွန်ုပ်သည် လုံခြုံရေးမျက်နှာကာကာနှင့် လုံခြုံရေးလက်အိတ်များကို ၀တ်ဆင်ထားသည်။

#######

#######

I like skiing. So, in winter, I often go skiing.

#######

I like skiing. So, in winter, I often go skiing.

I like skiing. So, in winter, I often go skiing.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मलाई स्कीइङ मन पर्छ। त्यसैले, जाडोमा, म प्रायः स्कीइङ जान्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំចូលចិត្តជិះស្គី។ ដូច្នេះក្នុងរដូវរងា ខ្ញុំតែងតែទៅជិះស្គី។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම ස්කීං වලට කැමතියි. ඉතින්, ශීත ඍතුවේ දී, මම බොහෝ විට ස්කීං යනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি স্কিইং পছন্দ করি। তাই, শীতকালে, আমি প্রায়ই স্কিইং যাই।

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 이 가방이 너무 무거운데 좀 도와 주시겠어요?
남자: 네, 그럴게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Cái túi này nặng quá, bạn có thể giúp tôi được không?
Nam: Vâng, để tôi làm cho.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Questa borsa è troppo pesante. Potresti aiutarmi?
Uomo: Sì, lo farò.

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Ce sac est trop lourd. Pourriez-vous m'aider?
Homme : Oui, je le ferai.

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Esta bolsa es demasiado pesada. ¿Usted me podría ayudar?
Hombre: Sí, lo haré.

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Tas ini terlalu berat. Bisakah kamu membantuku?
Pria: Ya, saya akan.

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性：このバッグは重すぎます。私たちを手伝ってくれますか？
男: はい、そうします。

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Diese Tasche ist zu schwer. Kannst du mir helfen?
Mann: Ja, das werde ich.

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：这个包太重了。你可以帮帮我吗？
男：是的，我会的。

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：這個包太重了。你可以幫幫我嗎？
男：是的，我會的。

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Эта сумка слишком тяжелая. Не могли бы вы помочь мне?
Мужчина: Да, сделаю.

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: กระเป๋าใบนี้หนักเกินไป คุณช่วยฉันได้ไหม?
ผู้ชาย: ใช่ ฉันจะทำ

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.

Homem: Sim, eu vou.

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: यह बैग बहुत भारी है. क्या आप मेरी मदद कर सकते हैं?
आदमी: हाँ, मैं करूँगा.

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:

Adam: Evet, yapacağım.

#######

Woman: This bag is too heavy. Could you help me?
Man: Yes, I will.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:

मान्छे: हो, म गर्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ កាបូបនេះធ្ងន់ពេកហើយ។ តើ​អ្នក​អាច​ជួយ​ខ្ញុំ​បាន​ទេ?
បុរស: បាទខ្ញុំនឹង។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: මේ බෑගය බර වැඩියි. ඔබට මට උදව් කළ හැකිද?
මිනිසා: ඔව්, මම කරන්නම්.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলাঃ এই ব্যাগটা খুব ভারী। তুমি কি আমাকে সাহায্য করবে?

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 오늘도 식당에 손님이 많았어?
여자: 응, 그래서 설거지할 게 너무 많았어.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Hôm nay nhà hàng cũng đông khách hả?
Nữ: Ừ, vậy nên có nhiều thứ phải rửa.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: C'erano molti clienti al ristorante oggi?
Donna: Sì, quindi c'erano così tanti piatti da lavare.

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Y avait-il beaucoup de clients au restaurant aujourd'hui ?
Femme : Ouais, donc il y avait tellement de vaisselle à laver.

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Había muchos clientes en el restaurante hoy?
Mujer: Sí, entonces había tantos platos que lavar.

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apakah ada banyak pelanggan di restoran hari ini?
Wanita: Ya, jadi banyak sekali piring yang harus dicuci.

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：今日、そのレストランにはたくさんのお客さんがいましたか。
女：そうね、洗わなければならない皿がたくさんあったわ。

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Waren heute viele Kunden im Restaurant?
Frau: Ja, es gab also so viel Geschirr zu spülen.

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：今天餐厅客人多吗？
女：是啊，所以有那么多盘子要洗。

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：今天餐廳客人多嗎？
女：是啊，所以有那麼多盤子要洗。

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Сегодня в ресторане было много посетителей?
Женщина: Да, нужно было помыть так много посуды.

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: วันนี้ลูกค้าที่ร้านเยอะมั้ย?
ผู้หญิง: ใช่ มีจานให้ล้างเยอะมาก

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Havia muitos clientes no restaurante hoje?
Mulher: Sim, então havia tantos pratos para lavar.

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: क्या आज रेस्तरां में बहुत सारे ग्राहक थे?
महिला: हाँ, तो धोने के लिए बहुत सारे बर्तन थे।

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bugün restoranda çok müşteri var mıydı?
Kadın: Evet, yani yıkanacak o kadar çok bulaşık vardı ki.

#######

Man: Were there many customers at the restaurant today?
Woman: Yeah, so there were so many dishes to wash.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मानिस: के आज रेस्टुरेन्टमा धेरै ग्राहकहरू थिए?
महिला: हो, त्यसैले त्यहाँ धेरै भाँडा धुने थियो।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ តើថ្ងៃនេះមានអតិថិជនច្រើននៅភោជនីយដ្ឋានទេ?
ស្ត្រី៖ បាទ មានចានច្រើនណាស់ដែលត្រូវលាង។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: අද අවන්හලේ බොහෝ ගනුදෙනුකරුවන් සිටියාද?
කාන්තාව: ඔව් ඉතින් පිඟන් ගොඩක් තිබුණා සේදිය යුතුයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: রেস্তোরাঁয় আজ কি অনেক কাস্টমার ছিল?
মহিলাঃ হ্যাঁ, তাই অনেক থালা-বাসন ছিল ধোয়ার।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man: ဒီနေ့ စားသောက်ဆိုင်မှာ ဖောက်သည်တွေ အများကြီးရှိလား။

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Trong cặp của tôi có sách, hộp đựng bút và ví. Bên trong là ảnh của bạn trai tôi. Còn sách thì có một cuốn.
g_text_audio_translate.en: There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
C'è il libro, l'astuccio e il portafoglio nella mia borsa. C'è una foto del mio ragazzo nel mio portafoglio. C'è solo un libro nella mia borsa.

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Il y a le livre, la trousse et le portefeuille dans mon sac. Il y a une photo de mon copain dans mon portefeuille. Il n'y a qu'un seul livre dans mon sac.

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
En mi bolso está el libro, el estuche para lápices y la billetera. Hay una foto de mi novio en mi billetera. Solo hay un libro en mi bolso.

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Ada buku, tempat pensil, dan dompet di tas saya. Ada foto pacarku di dompetku. Hanya ada satu buku di tas saya.

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
かばんの中に本と筆箱と財布があります。財布の中に彼氏の写真があります。かばんの中には本が一冊しかありません。

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Da sind das Buch, das Federmäppchen und die Brieftasche in meiner Tasche. In meiner Brieftasche ist ein Bild von meinem Freund. In meiner Tasche ist nur ein Buch.

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我的包里有书、铅笔盒和钱包。我的钱包里有一张我男朋友的照片。我的包里只有一本书。

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我的包裡有書、鉛筆盒和錢包。我的錢包裡有一張我男朋友的照片。我的包裡只有一本書。

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
В моей сумке книга, пенал и бумажник. В моем бумажнике лежит фотография моего парня. В моей сумке только одна книга.

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
มีหนังสือ กล่องดินสอ และกระเป๋าสตางค์อยู่ในกระเป๋าของฉัน มีรูปแฟนของฉันอยู่ในกระเป๋าเงินของฉัน มีหนังสือเล่มเดียวในกระเป๋าของฉัน

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Lá está o livro, o estojo e a carteira na minha bolsa. Há uma foto do meu namorado na minha carteira. Há apenas um livro na minha bolsa.

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मेरे बैग में किताब, पेंसिल केस और बटुआ है। मेरे बटुए में मेरे प्रेमी की एक तस्वीर है। मेरे बैग में केवल एक किताब है.

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Çantamda kitap, kalem kutusu ve cüzdan var. Cüzdanımda erkek arkadaşımın bir fotoğrafı var. Çantamda tek bir kitap var.

#######

There is the book, the pencil case, and the wallet in my bag. There is a picture of my boyfriend in my wallet. There is only one book in my bag.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मेरो झोलामा किताब, पेन्सिल र पर्स छ। मेरो वालेटमा मेरो प्रेमीको तस्बिर छ। मेरो झोलामा एउटा मात्र किताब छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: មានសៀវភៅ ប្រអប់ខ្មៅដៃ និងកាបូបដាក់ក្នុងកាបូបរបស់ខ្ញុំ។ មានរូបភាពរបស់មិត្តប្រុសរបស់ខ្ញុំនៅក្នុងកាបូបរបស់ខ្ញុំ។ មានតែសៀវភៅមួយក្បាលនៅក្នុងកាបូបរបស់ខ្ញុំ។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මගේ බෑග් එකේ පොත, පැන්සල් පෙට්ටිය සහ මුදල් පසුම්බිය තියෙනවා. මගේ මුදල් පසුම්බියේ මගේ පෙම්වතාගේ පින්තූරයක් ඇත. මගේ බෑග් එකේ තියෙන්නේ එක පොතයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমার ব্যাগে বই, পেন্সিল কেস এবং মানিব্যাগ আছে। আমার মানিব্যাগে আমার প্রেমিকের ছবি আছে। আমার ব্যাগে একটাই বই আছে।
g_text_audio_translate.my: စာအုပ်၊ ခဲတံအိတ်၊ အိတ်ထဲမှာ ပိုက်ဆံအိတ် ရှိတယ်။ ပိုက်ဆံအိတ်ထဲမှာ ငါ့ရည်းစားပုံရှိတယ်။ ငါ့အိတ်ထဲမှာ စာအုပ်တစ်အုပ်ပဲရှိတယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 양계장에서 일하고 있습니다. 우리 양계장에는 닭이 5천 마리 쯤 있습니다. 하루에 계란이 3,000개정도 나옵니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tôi làm việc trong một trang trại gà. Chúng tôi có khoảng 5,000 con gà trong trang trại. Khoảng 3,000 quả trứng được sản xuất mỗi ngày.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Sto lavorando in un allevamento di polli. Abbiamo circa 5.000 polli nel nostro allevamento di polli. Ne escono circa 3.000 uova al giorno.

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Je travaille dans un élevage de poulets. Nous avons environ 5 000 poulets dans notre élevage de poulets. Environ 3 000 œufs sortent par jour.

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Estoy trabajando en una granja de pollos. Tenemos alrededor de 5.000 pollos en nuestra granja de pollos. Salen unos 3.000 huevos al día.

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya bekerja di peternakan ayam. Kami memiliki sekitar 5.000 ekor ayam di peternakan ayam kami. Sekitar 3.000 telur keluar sehari.

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私は養鶏場で働いています。私たちの養鶏場には約 5,000 羽の鶏がいます。 1日に約3,000個の卵が産まれます。

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Ich arbeite in einer Hühnerfarm. Wir haben ungefähr 5.000 Hühner in unserer Hühnerfarm. Etwa 3.000 Eier kommen pro Tag heraus.

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我在养鸡场工作。我们养鸡场大约有 5,000 只鸡。每天约有 3,000 个鸡蛋出来。

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我在養雞場工作。我們養雞場大約有 5,000 隻雞。每天約有 3,000 個雞蛋出來。

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Я работаю на птицеферме. На нашей птицефабрике содержится около 5000 цыплят. В день выходит около 3000 яиц.

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ฉันทำงานในฟาร์มไก่ เรามีไก่ประมาณ 5,000 ตัวในฟาร์มไก่ของเรา ไข่ออกมาประมาณ 3,000 ฟองต่อวัน

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Estou trabalhando em uma granja de galinhas. Temos cerca de 5.000 galinhas em nossa granja. Cerca de 3.000 ovos saem por dia.

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मैं एक मुर्गी फार्म में काम कर रहा हूँ. हमारे मुर्गी फार्म में लगभग 5,000 मुर्गियाँ हैं। एक दिन में लगभग 3,000 अंडे निकलते हैं।

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Tavuk çiftliğinde çalışıyorum. Tavuk çiftliğimizde 5.000'e yakın tavuğumuz var. Günde yaklaşık 3.000 yumurta çıkıyor.

#######

I am working in a chicken farm. We have about 5,000 chickens in our chicken farm. About 3,000 eggs come out a day.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: म कुखुरा फार्ममा काम गर्छु। हाम्रो कुखुरा फार्ममा करिब ५ हजार कुखुरा छन् । दिनमा करिब ३ हजार अण्डा निस्कन्छ ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំធ្វើការនៅកសិដ្ឋានចិញ្ចឹមមាន់។ យើងមានមាន់ប្រហែល 5,000 ក្បាលនៅក្នុងកសិដ្ឋានចិញ្ចឹមមាន់របស់យើង។ ពងប្រហែល 3,000 ពងចេញមកក្នុងមួយថ្ងៃ។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම කුකුල් ගොවිපලක වැඩ කරනවා. අපේ කුකුළු ගොවිපළේ කුකුළන් 5000ක් පමණ ඉන්නවා. දිනකට බිත්තර 3000 ක් පමණ පිටතට පැමිණේ.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি একটি মুরগির খামারে কাজ করি। আমাদের মুরগির খামারে প্রায় পাঁচ হাজার মুরগি রয়েছে। দিনে প্রায় 3,000 ডিম বের হয়।
g_text_audio_translate.my: ကျွန်တော်က ကြက်ခြံမှာ အလုပ်လုပ်တယ်။ ကျွန်တော်တို့ ကြက်ခြံမှာ ကြက်ကောင်ရေ 5,000 လောက်ရှိတယ်။ တစ်နေ့ကို ကြက်ဥ ၃၀၀၀ လောက်ထွက်ပါတယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 비행기가 몇시에 출발해요? 
여자: 여섯시 십오분에 출발해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Mấy giờ máy bay khởi hành?
Nữ: Máy bay khởi hành lúc 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: A che ora parte il volo?
Donna: Il volo parte alle 6:15.

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : À quelle heure part le vol ?
Femme : Le vol part à 6h15.

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿A qué hora sale el vuelo?
Mujer: El vuelo sale a las 6:15.

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Jam berapa penerbangan berangkat?
Wanita: Penerbangan berangkat jam 6:15.

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: 飛行機は何時に出発しますか?
女性: 飛行機は 6 時 15 分発です。

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wann geht der Flug?
Frau: Der Flug geht um 6:15.

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：飞机几点起飞？
女士：航班 6 点 15 分起飞。

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：飛機幾點起飛？
女士：航班 6 點 15 分起飛。

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Во сколько вылетает рейс?
Женщина: Рейс вылетает в 6:15.

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: เที่ยวบินออกกี่โมง?
ผู้หญิง: เที่ยวบินออกเวลา 6:15 น.

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: A que horas sai o vôo?
Mulher: O vôo sai às 6h15.

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: फ्लाइट कितने बजे छूटती है?
महिला: फ्लाइट 6:15 बजे निकलती है.

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Uçak saat kaçta kalkıyor?
Kadın: Uçak 6:15'te kalkıyor.

#######

Man: What time does the flight leave?
Woman: The flight leaves at 6:15.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मान्छे : कति बजे उडान हुन्छ ?
महिला: उडान 6:15 मा छुट्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ តើជើងហោះហើរចេញម៉ោងប៉ុន្មាន?
ស្ត្រី៖ ជើងហោះហើរចេញនៅម៉ោង ៦៖១៥នាទី។
g_text_audio_translate.si:

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 오늘 아침에 빵하고 계란을 먹었습니다. 그리고 주스도 마셨습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Sáng nay tôi đã ăn bánh mì và trứng. Và tôi cũng uống nước trái cây.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Stamattina ho mangiato pane e uova. E ho bevuto anche il succo.

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
J'ai mangé du pain et des œufs ce matin. Et j'ai bu du jus aussi.

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Comí pan y huevos esta mañana. Y bebí jugo también.

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya makan roti dan telur pagi ini. Dan saya juga minum jus.

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
今朝はパンと卵を食べました。そしてジュースも飲みました。

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Ich habe heute Morgen Brot und Eier gegessen. Und Saft habe ich auch getrunken.

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
今天早上我吃了面包和鸡蛋。我也喝果汁。

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
今天早上我吃了麵包和雞蛋。我也喝果汁。

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Сегодня утром я ел хлеб и яйца. И я тоже пила сок.

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ฉันกินขนมปังและไข่เมื่อเช้านี้ และฉันก็ดื่มน้ำผลไม้ด้วย

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Comi pão e ovos esta manhã. E eu bebi suco também.

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मैंने आज सुबह ब्रेड और अंडे खाये। और मैंने जूस भी पिया.

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Bu sabah ekmek ve yumurta yedim. Ben de meyve suyu içtim.

#######

I ate bread and eggs this morning. And I drank juice too.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मैले आज बिहान रोटी र अण्डा खाएँ। अनि मैले पनि जुस पिएँ ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំ​បាន​ញ៉ាំ​នំបុ័ង​និង​ស៊ុត​នៅ​ព្រឹក​នេះ។ ហើយខ្ញុំក៏ផឹកទឹកផ្លែឈើដែរ។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම අද උදේ පාන් සහ බිත්තර කෑවා. ඒ වගේම මම ජූස් බිව්වා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি আজ সকালে রুটি এবং ডিম খেয়েছি। আর আমিও জুস খেয়েছিলাম।
g_text_audio_translate.my: ဒီမနက် မုန့်နဲ့ ကြက်ဥစားတယ်။ ပြီးတော့ ဖျော်ရည်လည်း သောက်တယ်။

계란: Trứng

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 우리 아버지는 소방수입니다. 불이 나면 언제든지 달려가십니다. 지난번 산에서 큰 불이 났을때 아버지는 하루 종일 불을 끄셨습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Bố tôi là lính cứu hỏa. Bất cứ khi nào có cháy, bố sẽ chạy đến. Lần trước có đám cháy lớn trên núi, bố tôi đã dập lửa suốt một ngày.
g_text_audio_translate.en: My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Mio padre è un vigile del fuoco. Quando c'è un incendio, corre lì. L'ultima volta che c'è stato un grande incendio in montagna, mio ​​padre ha spento il fuoco tutto il giorno.

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Mon père est pompier. Quand il y a un incendie, il y court. La dernière fois qu'il y a eu un grand incendie dans la montagne, mon père a éteint le feu toute la journée.

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mi padre es bombero. Cuando hay un incendio, corre hacia allí. La última vez que hubo un gran incendio en la montaña, mi padre apagó el fuego todo el día.

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Ayah saya adalah seorang pemadam kebakaran. Ketika ada api, dia berlari ke sana. Terakhir kali terjadi kebakaran besar di gunung, ayahku memadamkan api sepanjang hari.

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私の父は消防士です。火事になるとそこへ逃げる。前回、山で大火事があったとき、父は一日中火を消しました。

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mein Vater ist Feuerwehrmann. Wenn es brennt, rennt er dorthin. Als es das letzte Mal ein großes Feuer in den Bergen gab, hat mein Vater das Feuer den ganzen Tag gelöscht.

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我的父亲是一名消防员。发生火灾时，他会跑到那里。上次山上发生了一场大火，父亲救了一整天的火。

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我的父親是一名消防員。發生火災時，他會跑到那裡。上次山上發生了一場大火，父親救了一整天的火。

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мой отец пожарный. Когда случается пожар, он бежит туда. В прошлый раз, когда в горе случился большой пожар, мой отец весь день тушил огонь.

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
พ่อของฉันเป็นนักดับเพลิง เมื่อเกิดเพลิงไหม้เขาจะวิ่งไปที่นั่น คราวที่แล้วเกิดเพลิงไหม้ครั้งใหญ่บนภูเขาพ่อของฉันดับไฟทั้งวัน

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Meu pai é bombeiro. Quando há um incêndio, ele corre para lá. Da última vez que houve um grande incêndio na montanha, meu pai apagou o fogo o dia todo.

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मेरे पिता एक फायर फाइटर हैं. जब कहीं आग लगती है तो वह उधर ही भाग जाता है। पिछली बार पहाड़ में बड़ी आग लग गई थी, मेरे पिता ने पूरे दिन आग बुझाई।

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Babam itfaiyeci. Yangın çıkınca oraya koşuyor. En son dağda büyük bir yangın çıktığında babam bütün gün yangını söndürmüştü.

#######

My father is a firefighter. When there is a fire, he runs there. Last time there was a big fire in the mountain, my father put out the fire all day.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मेरो बुबा फायर फाइटर हुनुहुन्छ। आगो लाग्दा उ त्यहाँ दौडिन्छ । पछिल्लो पटक पहाडमा ठूलो आगो लाग्यो, बुबाले दिनभरी आगो निभाउनुभयो।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ឪពុកខ្ញុំជាអ្នកពន្លត់អគ្គីភ័យ។ ពេល​មាន​ភ្លើង គាត់​រត់​ទៅ​ទីនោះ។ លើក​មុន​មាន​ភ្លើង​ធំ​នៅ​ភ្នំ ឪពុក​ខ្ញុំ​ពន្លត់​ភ្លើង​ពេញ​មួយ​ថ្ងៃ។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මගේ තාත්තා ගිනි නිවන භටයෙක්. ගින්නක් ඇති වූ විට ඔහු එහි දුවයි. පහුගිය පාර කන්දේ ලොකු ගින්නක් ඇති උනොත් තාත්තා දවසම ගිනි තිබ්බා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমার বাবা একজন ফায়ার ফাইটার। আগুন লাগলে সে ছুটে যায়। গতবার পাহাড়ে বড়ো আগুন লেগেছিল, বাবা সারাদিন আগুন নিভিয়েছিল।
g_text_audio_translate.my: အဖေက မီးသတ်သမားပါ။ မီးလောင်တဲ့အခါ ပြေးတယ်။ နောက်ဆုံးအကြိမ် တောင်ကြီးမှာ မီးအကြီးအကျယ်လောင်ပြီး အဖေက တစ်နေ့လုံး မီးငြိမ်းသွားတယ်။

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 어제 겨울에 입을 긴 코트를 샀어요.
남자: 모자도 샀어요? 
여자: 아니요, 모자는 예쁜 게 없어서 안 샀어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Hôm qua tôi đã mua một chiếc áo khoác dài để mặc vào mùa đông.
Nam: Bạn cũng mua mũ chứ?
Nữ: Không, tôi không mua cái mũ vì không có cái nào đẹp.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I bought a long coat for the winter yesterday.
Man: Did you buy a hat too?
Woman: No, I didn't buy a hat because they didn't have a pretty one.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: ieri ho comprato un cappotto lungo per l'inverno.
Uomo: Hai comprato anche un cappello?
Donna: No, non ho comprato un cappello perché non ne avevano uno carino.

Homme : As-tu aussi acheté un chapeau ?
Femme : Non, je n'ai pas acheté de chapeau parce qu'ils n'en avaient pas de joli.

महिला: नहीं, मैंने कोई टोपी नहीं खरीदी क्योंकि उनके पास कोई सुंदर टोपी नहीं थी।

मान्छे: के तिमीले टोपी पनि किन्यौ?
महिला: होइन, मैले टोपी किनेको छैन किनभने तिनीहरूसँग राम्रो छैन।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ ខ្ញុំបានទិញអាវវែងសម្រាប់រដូវរងាកាលពីម្សិលមិញ។
បុរស៖ តើអ្នកបានទិញមួកដែរទេ?
ស្ត្រី៖ អត់ទេ ខ្ញុំមិនបានទិញមួកទេ ព្រោះអត់មានស្អាត។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: මම ඊයේ ශීත ඍතුව සඳහා දිගු කබායක් මිලදී ගත්තා.
මිනිසා: ඔබත් තොප්පියක් ගත්තාද?
කාන්තාව: නෑ, මම තොප්පියක් ගත්තෙ නෑ එයාලට ලස්සන එකක් නැති නිසා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলা: আমি গতকাল শীতের জন্য একটি লম্বা কোট কিনেছি।
লোক: তুমিও কি টুপি কিনেছ?
মহিলা: না, আমি একটি টুপি কিনিনি কারণ তাদের একটি সুন্দর ছিল না।

Man : ဦးထုပ်လည်း ဝယ်ခဲ့သေးလား။
အမျိုးသမီး : မဟုတ်ဘူး၊ သူတို့မှာ လှလှလေးတစ်လုံးမှမရှိလို့ ဦးထုပ်မဝယ်ခဲ့ဘူး။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 경찰관이에요. 사람들에게 도움을 주는 일이 아주 즐겁습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tôi là cảnh sát. Việc giúp đỡ cho người khác rất vui.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Sono un agente di polizia. Mi piace molto aiutare le persone.

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Je suis policier. J'aime vraiment aider les gens.

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Soy un oficial de policía. Realmente disfruto ayudar a la gente.

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya seorang petugas polisi. Saya sangat senang membantu orang.

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私は警察官です。私は人々を助けることを本当に楽しんでいます。

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Ich bin Polizist. Ich helfe sehr gerne Menschen.

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我是一名警察。我真的很喜欢帮助别人。

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我是一名警察。我真的很喜歡幫助別人。

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Я офицер полиции. Мне очень нравится помогать людям.

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ฉันเป็นเจ้าหน้าที่ตำรวจ ฉันสนุกกับการช่วยเหลือผู้คนจริงๆ

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Eu sou um policial. Eu realmente gosto de ajudar as pessoas.

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मैं एक पुलिस अधिकारी हूं. मुझे लोगों की मदद करने में सचमुच आनंद आता है।

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Ben bir polis memuruyum. İnsanlara yardım etmekten gerçekten keyif alıyorum.

#######

I'm a police officer. I really enjoy helping people.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: म प्रहरी अधिकारी हुँ। मलाई मानिसहरूलाई मद्दत गर्न साँच्चै आनन्द लाग्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំជាប៉ូលីស។ ខ្ញុំពិតជារីករាយក្នុងការជួយមនុស្ស។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම පොලිස් නිලධාරියෙක්. මම ඇත්තටම මිනිසුන්ට උදව් කරනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি একজন পুলিশ অফিসার। আমি সত্যিই মানুষ সাহায্য উপভোগ.
g_text_audio_translate.my: ကျွန်တော်က ရဲအရာရှိပါ။ လူတွေကို ကူညီရတာ အရမ်းပျော်တယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 실례지만 지금 몇시예요?
남자: 일곱시 오십분이예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Xin lỗi, bây giờ là mấy giờ ạ?
Nam: Bây giờ là 7 giờ 50 phút.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Mi scusi, che ore sono?
Uomo: Sono le 7:50.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Excusez-moi, quelle heure est-il ?
Homme : Il est 19h50.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Disculpe, ¿qué hora es?
Hombre: Son las 7:50.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Permisi, jam berapa sekarang?
Pria: Sekarang jam 7:50.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: すみません、今何時ですか?
男: 7:50 です。

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Entschuldigung, wie spät ist es?
Mann: Es ist 7:50.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：请问，现在几点了？
男：7:50。

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：請問，現在幾點了？
男：7:50。

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Извините, сколько сейчас времени?
Мужчина: Сейчас 7:50.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ขอโทษค่ะ กี่โมงแล้ว?
ผู้ชาย : 7.50 น.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Com licença, que horas são?
Homem: São 7h50.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्षमा करें, क्या समय हो गया है?
आदमी: 7:50 हो गए हैं.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Afedersiniz saat kaç?
Adam: Saat 7:50.

#######

Woman: Excuse me, what time is it?
Man: It's 7:50.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
केटी: माफ गर्नुस्, कति बज्यो ?
मान्छे: 7:50 भयो।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ សុំទោស តើម៉ោងប៉ុន្មានហើយ?
បុរស៖ ម៉ោង ៧:៥០។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: සමාවෙන්න, වෙලාව කීයද?
මිනිසා: වෙලාව 7:50 යි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলাঃ মাফ করবেন, কটা বাজে?
মানুষ: এখন 7:50।

general.g_text_audio: 운동을 해 봅시다. 두팔을 어깨 높이로 올리고 옆으로 쫙 펴세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Hãy tập thể dục nào. Đưa hai tay lên ngang vai và mở rộng sang hai bên.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Facciamo un po' di esercizio. Alza le braccia all'altezza delle spalle e allungale ai lati.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Faisons un peu d'exercice. Levez les bras à la hauteur des épaules et étirez-les sur les côtés.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hagamos un poco de ejercicio. Levanta los brazos a la altura de los hombros y estíralos hacia los lados.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Ayo berolahraga. Angkat lengan setinggi bahu dan regangkan ke samping.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
運動をしましょう。腕を肩の高さまで上げ、横に伸ばします。

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Lass uns ein bisschen Sport machen. Heben Sie die Arme auf Schulterhöhe und strecken Sie sie seitlich aus.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
让我们做一些练习。将手臂举到与肩同高，然后向两侧伸展。

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
讓我們做一些練習。將手臂舉到與肩同高，然後向兩側伸展。

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Давайте сделаем несколько упражнений. Поднимите руки на высоту плеч и вытяните их в стороны.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
มาออกกำลังกายกันหน่อย ยกแขนขึ้นให้สูงระดับไหล่แล้วเหยียดออกไปด้านข้าง

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Vamos fazer algum exercício. Levante os braços até a altura dos ombros e estique-os para os lados.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आइए कुछ व्यायाम करें. अपनी भुजाओं को कंधे की ऊँचाई तक उठाएँ और उन्हें बगल तक फैलाएँ।

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Hadi biraz egzersiz yapalım. Kollarınızı omuz yüksekliğine kaldırın ve yanlara doğru uzatın.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Raise your arms to shoulder height and stretch them out to the sides.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: केही व्यायाम गरौं। आफ्नो हातहरू काँधको उचाइमा उठाउनुहोस् र तिनीहरूलाई छेउमा फैलाउनुहोस्।
g_text_audio_translate.km: តោះធ្វើលំហាត់ខ្លះ។ លើកដៃរបស់អ្នកទៅកម្ពស់ស្មា ហើយលាតវាទៅម្ខាង។
g_text_audio_translate.si: අපි ව්‍යායාම ටිකක් කරමු. ඔබේ දෑත් උරහිස් උසට ඔසවන්න, දෙපැත්තට දිගු කරන්න.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আসুন কিছু ব্যায়াম করি। আপনার বাহুগুলি কাঁধের উচ্চতায় বাড়ান এবং তাদের পাশে প্রসারিত করুন।
g_text_audio_translate.my: လေ့ကျင့်ခန်းတစ်ခုခုလုပ်ရအောင်။ လက်နှစ်ဖက်ကို ပခုံးအမြင့်ထိ မြှင့်ပြီး ဘေးနှစ်ဖက်ကို ဆန့်တန်းထားပါ။
