title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 이 공장에 취직을 하면 어떤 일을 하게 됩니까?
여자: 주로 다 만들어진 옷을 다리는 일을 할 거예요.
포장하기 전에 깨끗하게 다림질을 해야 하거든요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Nếu tôi được làm việc tại nhà máy này, tôi sẽ làm gì ạ?
Nữ: Chủ yếu bạn sẽ là quần áo đã được may sẵn. Chúng cần được ủi sạch sẽ trước khi đóng gói.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Cosa farò se trovo lavoro in questa fabbrica?
Donna: Stirerai principalmente capi già confezionati.
Deve essere stirato pulito prima dell'imballaggio.

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Que vais-je faire si j'obtiens un emploi dans cette usine ?
Femme : Vous repasserez principalement des vêtements déjà confectionnés.
Il doit être repassé propre avant l'emballage.

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Qué haré si consigo un trabajo en esta fábrica?
Mujer: Plancharás principalmente ropa ya hecha.
Debe plancharse antes de empacar.

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apa yang akan saya lakukan jika saya mendapat pekerjaan di pabrik ini?
Wanita: Anda terutama akan menyetrika pakaian yang sudah jadi.
Perlu disetrika bersih sebelum dikemas.

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：この工場に就職したらどうする？
女性：主に仕立て済みの洋服にアイロンをかけていただきます。
梱包前にきれいにアイロンがけする必要があります。

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Was werde ich tun, wenn ich einen Job in dieser Fabrik bekomme?
Frau: Sie werden hauptsächlich bereits fertige Kleidungsstücke bügeln.
Es muss vor dem Verpacken sauber gebügelt werden.

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：如果我在这家工厂找到工作，我会做什么？
女：你主要熨烫已经做好的衣服。
包装前需要熨烫干净。

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：如果我在這家工廠找到工作，我會做什麼？
女：你主要熨燙已經做好的衣服。
包裝前需要熨燙乾淨。

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Что я буду делать, если получу работу на этом заводе?
Женщина: В основном вы будете гладить уже сшитую одежду.
Перед упаковкой его необходимо тщательно прогладить.

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ชาย: ถ้าได้งานที่โรงงานนี้ผมจะทำอย่างไร?
ผู้หญิง: คุณจะรีดเสื้อผ้าที่ทำเสร็จแล้วเป็นหลัก
ต้องรีดให้สะอาดก่อนบรรจุ

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: O que farei se conseguir um emprego nesta fábrica?
Mulher: Você vai passar principalmente roupas que já foram confeccionadas.
Ele precisa ser passado a ferro antes de embalar.

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: अगर मुझे इस फैक्ट्री में नौकरी मिल जाए तो मैं क्या करूंगा?
महिला: आप मुख्य रूप से उन कपड़ों को इस्त्री करेंगे जो पहले ही बन चुके हैं।
पैकिंग से पहले इसे इस्त्री कर साफ करना आवश्यक है।

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bu fabrikada iş bulursam ne yapacağım?
Kadın: Çoğunlukla daha önce yapılmış kıyafetleri ütüleyeceksin.
Paketlemeden önce ütülenmesi gerekiyor.

#######

Man: What will I do if I get a job at this factory?
Woman: You will mainly iron clothes that have already been made.
It needs to be ironed clean before packing.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मान्छे : यो कारखानामा जागिर पायो भने के गरुँ ?
महिला: तपाईले पहिले नै बनाइएका लुगाहरू इस्त्री गर्नुहुन्छ।
यसलाई प्याक गर्नु अघि सफा इस्त्री गर्न आवश्यक छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ តើខ្ញុំត្រូវធ្វើអ្វីប្រសិនបើខ្ញុំទទួលបានការងារនៅរោងចក្រនេះ?
ស្ត្រី៖ អ្នក​នឹង​ដែក​ជា​ចម្បង​លើ​សម្លៀក​បំពាក់​ដែល​បាន​ធ្វើ​រួច​ហើយ។
វាត្រូវតែត្រូវបានដែកស្អាតមុនពេលវេចខ្ចប់។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: මට මේ කර්මාන්ත ශාලාවේ රැකියාවක් ලැබුණොත් මම කුමක් කරන්නද?
කාන්තාව: ඔබ ප්රධාන වශයෙන් දැනටමත් සාදා ඇති ඇඳුම් මදිනු ඇත.
ඇසුරුම් කිරීමට පෙර එය පිරිසිදුව අයන් කළ යුතුය.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: এই কারখানায় চাকরি পেলে আমি কী করব?
মহিলা: আপনি মূলত ইস্ত্রি করবেন এমন পোশাক যা ইতিমধ্যে তৈরি করা হয়েছে।
এটি প্যাক করার আগে পরিষ্কার ইস্ত্রি করা প্রয়োজন।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man: ဒီစက်ရုံမှာ အလုပ်ရရင် ဘာလုပ်မလဲ။
အမျိုးသမီး- သင်လုပ်ပြီးသား အဝတ်အစားတွေကို အဓိကထားပြီး မီးပူတိုက်မယ်။
ထုပ်ပိုးခြင်းမပြုမီ မီးပူတိုက်သန့်စင်ရန် လိုအပ်ပါသည်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 운동을 해 봅시다. 허리를 굽히세요. 팔을 밑으로 뻗어 두손이 발에 닿도록 하세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Hãy tập thể dục nào. Hãy cúi lưng xuống. Duỗi tay xuống phía dưới sao cho hai bàn tay đụng vào bàn chân.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Facciamo un po' di esercizio. Piegarsi. Allunga le braccia verso il basso in modo che le tue mani tocchino i tuoi piedi.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Faisons un peu d'exercice. Se pencher en avant. Étendez vos bras vers le bas pour que vos mains touchent vos pieds.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hagamos un poco de ejercicio. Agacharse. Extiende tus brazos hacia abajo para que tus manos toquen tus pies.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Ayo berolahraga. Melengkung. Rentangkan tangan Anda ke bawah sehingga tangan Anda menyentuh kaki Anda.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
運動をしましょう。腰をかがめる。手が足に触れるように腕を下に伸ばします。

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Lass uns ein bisschen Sport machen. Sich bücken. Strecken Sie Ihre Arme nach unten, sodass Ihre Hände Ihre Füße berühren.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
让我们做一些练习。弯腰。向下伸展你的手臂，让你的手接触到你的脚。

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
讓我們做一些練習。彎腰。向下伸展你的手臂，讓你的手接觸到你的腳。

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Давайте сделаем несколько упражнений. Наклониться вперед. Вытяните руки вниз так, чтобы ладони коснулись ног.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
มาออกกำลังกายกันหน่อย โค้งงอ เหยียดแขนลงเพื่อให้มือแตะเท้า

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Vamos fazer algum exercício. Curvar. Estenda os braços para baixo de modo que as mãos toquem os pés.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आइए कुछ व्यायाम करें. मु़ड़ें। अपनी बाहों को नीचे फैलाएं ताकि आपके हाथ आपके पैरों को छूएं।

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Hadi biraz egzersiz yapalım. Eğil. Elleriniz ayaklarınıza değecek şekilde kollarınızı aşağı doğru uzatın.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Bend over. Extend your arms down so your hands touch your feet.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: केही व्यायाम गरौं। झुकाउनुहोस्। आफ्नो हात तल विस्तार गर्नुहोस् ताकि तपाईंका हातहरू तपाईंको खुट्टा छुनुहोस्।
g_text_audio_translate.km: តោះធ្វើលំហាត់ខ្លះ។ ពត់លើ។ ពង្រីកដៃរបស់អ្នកចុះក្រោម ដើម្បីឱ្យដៃរបស់អ្នកប៉ះជើងរបស់អ្នក។
g_text_audio_translate.si: අපි ව්‍යායාම ටිකක් කරමු. ඉහළින් නැමීම. ඔබේ දෑත් ඔබේ පාද ස්පර්ශ වන පරිදි ඔබේ දෑත් පහළට දිගු කරන්න.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আসুন কিছু ব্যায়াম করি। উপর বাঁক. আপনার হাত নীচে প্রসারিত করুন যাতে আপনার হাত আপনার পায়ে স্পর্শ করে।
g_text_audio_translate.my: လေ့ကျင့်ခန်းတစ်ခုခုလုပ်ရအောင်။ ကိုင်းညွတ်သည်။ သင်၏လက်များကို အောက်သို့ဆန့်၍ လက်များကို သင်၏ခြေဖဝါးတို့ထိစေပါ။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 오늘은 배에 물건을 싣는 일을 할 겁니다. 오늘 내로 끝내야 하니까 서두르세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Công việc hôm nay là chất đồ đạc lên thuyền. Phải kết thúc trong hôm nay nên hãy làm nhanh lên.
g_text_audio_translate.en: Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Oggi caricheremo merci su una nave. Sbrigati perché dobbiamo finirlo oggi.

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Aujourd'hui, nous allons charger des marchandises sur un bateau. Dépêchez-vous car nous devons le terminer aujourd'hui.

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hoy estaremos cargando mercancías en un barco. Date prisa porque tenemos que terminarlo hoy.

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Hari ini kita akan memuat barang di kapal. Bergegaslah karena kita harus menyelesaikannya hari ini.

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
今日は船に荷物を積み込みます。今日中に終わらせないといけないので急いでください。

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Heute werden wir Waren auf ein Schiff laden. Beeil dich, denn wir müssen es heute beenden.

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
今天我们将把货物装上船。快点，因为我们今天必须完成它。

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
今天我們將把貨物裝上船。快點，因為我們今天必須完成它。

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Сегодня мы будем грузить товар на корабль. Поторопитесь, потому что нам нужно закончить это сегодня.

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
วันนี้เราจะทำการบรรทุกสินค้าลงเรือ รีบหน่อยเพราะวันนี้เราต้องทำให้เสร็จ

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Hoje estaremos carregando mercadorias em um navio. Apresse-se porque temos que terminar hoje.

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आज हम जहाज़ पर माल लादेंगे। जल्दी करो क्योंकि हमें इसे आज ही ख़त्म करना है।

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Bugün bir gemiye mal yükleyeceğiz. Acele edin çünkü bugün bitirmemiz gerekiyor.

#######

Today we will be loading goods on a ship. Hurry up because we have to finish it today.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: आज हामी जहाजमा सामान लोड गर्नेछौं। हतार गर्नुहोस् किनकि हामीले यसलाई आज समाप्त गर्नु पर्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ថ្ងៃនេះយើងនឹងផ្ទុកទំនិញនៅលើកប៉ាល់។ ប្រញាប់ឡើងព្រោះយើងត្រូវបញ្ចប់ថ្ងៃនេះ។
g_text_audio_translate.si: අද අපි නැවකට බඩු පටවනවා. ඉක්මන් කරන්න මොකද අදම ඉවර කරන්න ඕන.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আজ আমরা একটি জাহাজে পণ্য লোড করা হবে. তাড়াহুড়ো করো কারণ আজই শেষ করতে হবে।
g_text_audio_translate.my: ဒီနေ့ သင်္ဘောပေါ်မှာ ကုန်ပစ္စည်းတွေ တင်မယ်။ ဒီနေ့အပြီးသတ်ရမှာဆိုတော့ မြန်မြန်လေး

general.g_text_audio: 손님, 이 구두는 어떠세요? 한번 신어 보세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Quý khách, đôi giày này thì sao ạ? Quý khách hãy mang thử.
g_text_audio_translate.en: How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Che ne dici di queste scarpe, signore? Provateli.

#######

How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Que diriez-vous de ces chaussures, monsieur? Essaie-les.

#######

How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
¿Qué tal estos zapatos, señor? Pruebatelos.

#######

How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Bagaimana dengan sepatu ini, Pak? Cobalah mereka.

#######

How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
この靴はどうですか、先生？それらを試してみてください。

#######

How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Wie wäre es mit diesen Schuhen, Sir? Probier sie an.

#######

How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
先生，这双鞋怎么样？试戴。

#######

How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
先生，這雙鞋怎麼樣？試戴。

#######

How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Как насчет этих туфель, сэр? Попробуй их.

#######

How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
แล้วรองเท้าคู่นี้ล่ะ? ลองพวกเขา.

#######

g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Que tal esses sapatos, senhor? Experimenta-os.

इन जूतों का क्या होगा, सर? उनको प्रयोग करने दो।

#######

g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Bu ayakkabılara ne dersiniz efendim? Onları dene.

#######

How about these shoes, sir? Try them on.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: यी जुत्ताहरू, सर? तिनीहरूलाई प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ចុះស្បែកជើងទាំងនេះវិញ? សាកល្បងពួកវា។
g_text_audio_translate.si: කොහොමද සර් මේ සපත්තු? ඒවා උත්සාහ කරන්න.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: এই জুতা কি স্যার? তাদের চেষ্টা.
g_text_audio_translate.my: ဒီဖိနပ်က ဘယ်လိုလဲ ဆရာ။ ၎င်းတို့ကို စမ်းကြည့်ပါ။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 밤방 씨는 무슨 일을 하세요? 
남자: 건물을 짓는 공사장에서 일하고 있어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh Bambang làm công việc gì?
Nam: Tôi đang làm việc trên một công trường xây nhà.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Cosa fai, Bambang?
Uomo: Sto lavorando in un cantiere che costruisce un edificio.

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Qu'est-ce que tu fais, Bambang ?
Homme : Je travaille sur un chantier de construction qui construit un bâtiment.

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Qué haces, Bambang?
Hombre: Estoy trabajando en un sitio de construcción que construye un edificio.

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apa yang kamu lakukan, Bambang?
Pria: Saya sedang bekerja di lokasi konstruksi yang membangun gedung.

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 何をしているの、バンバン?
男性：ビルを建てる工事現場の仕事をしています。

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Was machst du, Bambang?
Mann: Ich arbeite auf einer Baustelle, die ein Gebäude baut.

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女人：班邦，你是做什么的？
男人：我正在一个建造建筑物的建筑工地工作。

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女人：班邦，你是做什麼的？
男：我正在一個建造建築物的建築工地工作。

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Чем ты занимаешься, Бамбанг?
Мужчина: Я работаю на стройке, на которой строится здание.

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: คุณทำอะไรแบมแบง?
ผู้ชาย: ฉันกำลังทำงานในไซต์ก่อสร้างที่สร้างอาคาร

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: O que você faz, Bambang?
Homem: Estou trabalhando em um canteiro de obras que constrói um prédio.

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: तुम क्या करते हो, बंबांग?
आदमी: मैं एक निर्माण स्थल पर काम कर रहा हूँ जो एक इमारत बनाता है।

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Ne yapıyorsun Bambang?
Adam: Bir bina inşa eden bir şantiyede çalışıyorum.

#######

Woman: What do you do, Bambang?
Man: I'm working on a construction site that builds a building.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला : के गर्छौ बम्बाङ ?
मानिस: म भवन निर्माण गर्ने निर्माण साइटमा काम गर्दैछु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ ធ្វើស្អី?
បុរស៖ ខ្ញុំ​កំពុង​ធ្វើ​ការ​លើ​ការដ្ឋាន​សំណង់​ដែល​សង់​អគារ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: ඔබ මොකද කරන්නේ, බම්බන්ග්?
මිනිසා: මම ගොඩනැගිල්ලක් ඉදිකරන ඉදිකිරීම් අඩවියක වැඩ කරනවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলাঃ তুমি কি কর, বামবাং?
মানুষ: আমি একটি নির্মাণ সাইটে কাজ করছি যেটি একটি বিল্ডিং তৈরি করে।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
မိန်းမ : မင်းဘာလုပ်တာလဲ Bambang
Man : ကျွန်တော် ဆောက်လုပ်ရေးလုပ်ငန်းခွင်မှာ အဆောက်အဦးဆောက်နေပါတယ်။

g_text_audio_translate.km: តោះធ្វើលំហាត់ខ្លះ។ លាតជើងរបស់អ្នកបន្តិច ហើយកាន់ដៃរបស់អ្នកនៅពីក្រោយក្បាលរបស់អ្នក។
g_text_audio_translate.si: අපි ව්‍යායාම ටිකක් කරමු. ඔබේ කකුල් තරමක් විහිදුවන්න, ඔබේ හිස පිටුපස ඔබේ දෑත් අල්ලා ගන්න.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আসুন কিছু ব্যায়াম করি। আপনার পা সামান্য ছড়িয়ে দিন এবং আপনার মাথার পিছনে আপনার হাত ধরে রাখুন।
g_text_audio_translate.my: လေ့ကျင့်ခန်းတစ်ခုခုလုပ်ရအောင်။ ခြေထောက်များကို အနည်းငယ်ဖြန့်ပြီး လက်နှစ်ဖက်ကို ခေါင်းနောက်တွင် အုပ်ထားပါ။

आइए कुछ व्यायाम करें. अपने हाथों को अपनी कमर पर रखें और अपनी कमर को चारों ओर घुमाएँ।

#######

Let's do some exercise. Put your hands on your waist and turn your waist around.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Hadi biraz egzersiz yapalım. Ellerinizi belinize koyun ve belinizi çevirin.

#######

Let's do some exercise. Put your hands on your waist and turn your waist around.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: केही व्यायाम गरौं। आफ्नो कम्मरमा आफ्नो हात राख्नुहोस् र आफ्नो कम्मर वरिपरि घुमाउनुहोस्।
g_text_audio_translate.km: តោះធ្វើលំហាត់ខ្លះ។ ដាក់ដៃរបស់អ្នកនៅលើចង្កេះរបស់អ្នកហើយបង្វិលចង្កេះរបស់អ្នក។
g_text_audio_translate.si: අපි ව්‍යායාම ටිකක් කරමු. ඔබේ ඉණ මත ඔබේ දෑත් තබා ඔබේ ඉණ වටා හරවන්න.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আসুন কিছু ব্যায়াম করি। আপনার কোমরে হাত রাখুন এবং আপনার কোমরটি ঘুরিয়ে দিন।
g_text_audio_translate.my: လေ့ကျင့်ခန်းတစ်ခုခုလုပ်ရအောင်။ မင်းလက်တွေကို ခါးပေါ်တင်ပြီး ခါးကိုလှည့်ပါ။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 제 직업은 택시 운전 기사입니다. 항상 손님을 친절하고 안전하게 모십니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Công việc của tôi là tài xế taxi. Tôi luôn đưa đón khách một cách thân thiện và an toàn.
g_text_audio_translate.en: My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Il mio lavoro è un tassista. Servo sempre i nostri ospiti in modo gentile e sicuro.

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Mon métier est chauffeur de taxi. Je sers toujours nos invités avec gentillesse et sécurité.

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mi trabajo es taxista. Siempre atiendo a nuestros huéspedes con amabilidad y seguridad.

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pekerjaan saya adalah seorang sopir taksi. Saya selalu melayani tamu kami dengan ramah dan aman.

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私の仕事はタクシー運転手です。私はいつもお客様に親切に、安全にサービスを提供しています。

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mein Beruf ist Taxifahrer. Ich betreue unsere Gäste immer freundlich und sicher.

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我的工作是出租车司机。我总是亲切和安全地为我们的客人服务。

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我的工作是出租車司機。我總是親切和安全地為我們的客人服務。

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Моя работа – водитель такси. Я всегда обслуживаю наших гостей доброжелательно и безопасно.

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
งานของฉันคือคนขับแท็กซี่ ฉันให้บริการแขกของเราด้วยความกรุณาและปลอดภัยเสมอ

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Meu trabalho é motorista de táxi. Sempre atendo nossos hóspedes com gentileza e segurança.

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मेरा काम टैक्सी ड्राइवर का है. मैं हमेशा अपने मेहमानों की दयालुतापूर्वक और सुरक्षित रूप से सेवा करता हूं।

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Mesleğim taksi şoförlüğü. Misafirlerimize her zaman nazik ve güvenli bir şekilde hizmet ederim.

#######

My job is a taxi driver. I always serve our guests kindly and safely.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मेरो काम ट्याक्सी चालक हो। म सधैं हाम्रा पाहुनाहरूलाई दयालु र सुरक्षित रूपमा सेवा गर्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ការងាររបស់ខ្ញុំគឺអ្នកបើកតាក់ស៊ី។ ខ្ញុំតែងតែបម្រើភ្ញៀវរបស់យើងដោយសុភាព និងសុវត្ថិភាព។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මගේ රැකියාව කුලී රථ රියදුරෙක්. මම සෑම විටම අපගේ අමුත්තන්ට කාරුණිකව සහ ආරක්ෂිතව සේවය කරමි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমার কাজ একজন ট্যাক্সি ড্রাইভার। আমি সবসময় আমাদের অতিথিদের সদয় এবং নিরাপদে পরিবেশন করি।
g_text_audio_translate.my: ကျွန်တော့်အလုပ်က တက္ကစီသမားပါ။ ဧည့်သည်တွေကို ကြင်ကြင်နာနာနဲ့ ဘေးကင်းစွာ ဝန်ဆောင်မှုပေးနေပါတယ်။

general.g_text_audio: 제 동생은 머리가 길어요. 그리고 안경을 썼어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tóc của em tôi dài. Và em tôi đeo kính.
g_text_audio_translate.en: My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Mio fratello/sorella minore ha i capelli lunghi. E portava gli occhiali.

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Mon jeune frère/sœur a les cheveux longs. Et il/elle portait des lunettes.

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mi hermano/hermana menor tiene el pelo largo. Y llevaba gafas.

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Adik laki-laki / perempuan saya memiliki rambut panjang. Dan dia memakai kacamata.

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私の弟/妹は髪が長いです。そして彼/彼女は眼鏡をかけていました。

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mein jüngerer Bruder/meine jüngere Schwester hat lange Haare. Und er/sie trug eine Brille.

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我的弟弟/妹妹留着长头发。他/她戴着眼镜。

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我的弟弟/妹妹留著長頭髮。他/她戴著眼鏡。

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
У моего младшего брата/сестры длинные волосы. И он/она носил очки.

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
น้องชาย/น้องสาวของฉันมีผมยาว และเขา/เธอสวมแว่นตา

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Meu irmão/irmã mais novo tem cabelo comprido. E ele/ela usava óculos.

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मेरे छोटे भाई/बहन के बाल लंबे हैं। और उसने चश्मा पहना था।

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Küçük erkek kardeşimin/kız kardeşimin uzun saçları var. Ve gözlük takıyordu.

#######

My younger brother/sister has long hair. And he/she wore glasses.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मेरो कान्छो भाइ/बहिनीको कपाल लामो छ। र उसले चश्मा लगायो।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ប្អូនប្រុស/ប្អូនស្រីរបស់ខ្ញុំមានសក់វែង។ ហើយគាត់ពាក់វ៉ែនតា។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මගේ මල්ලි/සහෝදරියට දිග කොණ්ඩයක් තියෙනවා. තවද ඔහු/ඇය කණ්නාඩි පැළඳ සිටියේය.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমার ছোট ভাই/বোনের চুল লম্বা। এবং তিনি চশমা পরতেন।
g_text_audio_translate.my: ညီငယ် ညီမလေး ဆံပင်ရှည်တယ်။ ပြီးတော့ သူက မျက်မှန်တပ်တယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 저쪽에 쌓여 있는 벽돌도 날라야 합니까?
나: 아니요. 저쪽 것은 다른 곳으로 가져가야 해요. 이쪽에 있는 벽돌만 옮겨 주시면 돼요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Tôi có phải mang cả những viên gạch chồng lên ở đó không?
B: Không. Cái đó phải mang tới một nơi khác. Bạn chỉ cần di chuyển các viên gạch ở đây.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Devo portare anche i mattoni ammucchiati laggiù?
B: No. Quella deve essere portata altrove. Devi solo spostare i mattoni su questo lato.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Dois-je également transporter les briques empilées là-bas ?
B : Non. Celui-là doit être emmené ailleurs. Il vous suffit de déplacer les briques de ce côté.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: ¿Tengo que llevar los ladrillos apilados allí también?
B: No. Ese hay que llevarlo a otra parte. Solo necesitas mover los ladrillos de este lado.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Apakah saya juga harus membawa tumpukan batu bata ke sana?
B: Tidak. Yang itu harus dibawa ke tempat lain. Anda hanya perlu memindahkan batu bata di sisi ini.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A:あそこに積み上げたレンガも運ばなきゃいけないの？
B: いいえ。それは別の場所に持って行かなければなりません。こちら側のレンガを移動するだけです。

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
A: Muss ich die aufgetürmten Ziegel auch dort drüben tragen?
B: Nein. Das muss woanders gemacht werden. Sie müssen nur die Steine ​​​​auf dieser Seite verschieben.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A: 堆在那边的砖头是不是也得搬过来？
B: 不行，那只得带到别处去。你只需要移动这边的砖块。

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A: 堆在那邊的磚頭是不是也得搬過來？
B: 不行，那隻得帶到別處去。你只需要移動這邊的磚塊。

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
А: Мне тоже придется нести туда сложенные кирпичи?
Б: Нет. Это нужно взять в другом месте. Вам просто нужно переместить кирпичи на этой стороне.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
A: ต้องแบกอิฐที่กองไว้ตรงนั้นด้วยหรือเปล่า?
B: ไม่ อันนั้นต้องเอาไปที่อื่น คุณเพียงแค่ต้องย้ายอิฐที่อยู่ด้านนี้

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
A: Tenho que carregar os tijolos empilhados ali também?
B: Não. Esse tem que ser levado para outro lugar. Você só precisa mover os tijolos deste lado.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: क्या मुझे वहां पर ढेर की गई ईंटों को भी ले जाना होगा?
बी: नहीं, उसे कहीं और ले जाना होगा। आपको बस ईंटों को इस तरफ ले जाने की जरूरत है।

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
C: Oraya yığılmış tuğlaları da mı taşımam gerekiyor?
B: Hayır. Bunun başka bir yere götürülmesi gerekiyor. Bu taraftaki tuğlaları hareket ettirmeniz yeterli.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: के मैले त्यहाँ थुप्रिएको इँटाहरू पनि बोक्नुपर्छ?
B: होइन, त्यो अर्को ठाउँमा लैजानुपर्छ। तपाईलाई यो छेउमा ईंटहरू सार्न आवश्यक छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ចម្លើយ៖ តើ​ខ្ញុំ​ត្រូវ​យក​ឥដ្ឋ​ដែល​គរ​នៅ​ទីនោះ​ដែរ​ឬ​ទេ?
ខ៖ អត់ទេ នោះត្រូវយកទៅកន្លែងផ្សេង។ អ្នកគ្រាន់តែត្រូវការផ្លាស់ទីឥដ្ឋនៅខាងនេះ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
පිළිතුර:- එතනත් ගොඩගසා තිබෙන ගඩොල් රැගෙන යා යුතුද?
ආ.. නෑ ඒක වෙන තැනකට ගෙනියන්න වෙනවා. ඔබ මේ පැත්තේ ගඩොල් ගෙනයාමට අවශ්යයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তর: আমাকে কি সেখানে স্তূপ করা ইটগুলোও বহন করতে হবে?
বি: না। এটাকে অন্য কোথাও নিয়ে যেতে হবে। আপনি শুধু এই দিকে ইট সরাতে হবে।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
ဖြေ။ ဟိုမှာ အုတ်တွေစုထားရမလား။
B: မဟုတ်ဘူး၊ အဲဒါကို တခြားနေရာမှာ ယူရမယ်။ ဒီဘက်ခြမ်းက အုတ်တွေကို ရွှေ့ဖို့ပဲလိုတယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 바람이 많이 부는데 문 좀 닫아 주시겠어요?
남자: 네, 닫아 드릴게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Trời gió mạnh quá, bạn có thể đóng cửa lại giúp tôi được không?
Nam: Vâng, tôi sẽ đóng cho.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: C'è molto vento. Potresti chiudere la porta?
Uomo: OK, lo chiudo.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Il y a beaucoup de vent. Pourriez-vous fermer la porte ?
Homme : OK, je vais le fermer.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Hace mucho viento. ¿Podrías cerrar la puerta?
Hombre: OK, lo cerraré.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Ini sangat berangin. Bisakah kamu menutup pintunya?
Pria: Oke, saya akan menutupnya.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性：風がとても強いです。ドアを閉めていただけますか？
男: わかりました、閉めます。

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Es ist sehr windig. Könntest du die Tür schließen?
Mann: OK, ich werde es schließen.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：风很大。你能关上门吗？
男：好的，我关掉它。

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：風很大。你能關上門嗎？
男：好的，我關掉它。

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Очень ветрено. Не могли бы вы закрыть дверь?
Мужчина: Хорошо, я закрою.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ลมแรงมาก คุณช่วยปิดประตูได้ไหม?
ผู้ชาย : โอเค ฉันจะปิดมันแล้ว

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Está ventando muito. Você poderia fechar a porta?
Homem: OK, vou fechar.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: बहुत तेज़ हवा है. क्या आप दरवाज़ा बंद कर सकते हैं?
आदमी: ठीक है, मैं इसे बंद कर दूंगा।

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Çok rüzgarlı. Kapıyı kapatabilir misin?
Adam: Tamam kapatıyorum.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला: धेरै हावा चलेको छ। के तपाईं ढोका बन्द गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ?
मान्छे: ठीक छ, म यसलाई बन्द गर्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ ខ្យល់ខ្លាំង។ តើអ្នកអាចបិទទ្វារបានទេ?
បុរស៖ យល់ព្រម ខ្ញុំនឹងបិទវា។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: හොඳටම හුළං. ඔබට දොර වසා ගත හැකිද?
මිනිසා: හරි, මම එය වසා දමමි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলাঃ খুব ঝোড়ো হাওয়া। আপনি কি দরজা বন্ধ করতে পারেন?
মানুষ: ঠিক আছে, আমি এটা বন্ধ করব.
g_text_audio_translate.my:
အမျိုးသမီး : လေအရမ်းတိုက်တယ်။ တံခါးကိုပိတ်လို့ရမလား
Man: အိုကေ၊ ငါပိတ်လိုက်မယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 저기, 모하메드씨 이쪽으로 와서 같이 그물을 좀 끌어올려요. 
나: 네. 아이고. 그 그물에 멸치가 꽤 많이 걸렸나봐요. 굉장히 무겁네요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Này, Mohammed, lại đây cùng kéo lưới lên đi.
B: Vâng. Trời ơi. Có vẻ có khá nhiều cá cơm mắc lưới. Nặng thật.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Ehi, Mohammed, vieni qui e tira su insieme la rete.
B: Va bene. Oh mio. Ci devono essere molte acciughe nella rete. È molto pesante.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A: Hé, Mohammed, viens ici et tire ensemble le filet.
B : D'accord. Oh mon. Il doit y avoir beaucoup d'anchois dans le filet. C'est très lourd.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
R: Oye, Mohammed, ven aquí y levanten la red juntos.
B: Está bien. Oh mi. Debe haber muchas anchoas en la red. es muy pesado

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Hei, Mohammed, datang ke sini dan tarik jaringnya bersama-sama.
B: Oke. Astaga. Pasti ada banyak ikan teri di jaring. Ini sangat berat.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A: ねえ、モハメッド、こっちに来て、一緒に網を引っ張って。
B: わかりました。なんてこった。網の中にはアンチョビがたくさんあるはずです。とても重いです。

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
A: Hey, Mohammed, komm her und zieh zusammen das Netz hoch.
B: Okay. Oh mein. Es müssen viele Sardellen im Netz sein. Es ist sehr schwer.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A：嘿，穆罕默德，过来，一起拉网。
乙：好的。天啊。网里肯定有很多凤尾鱼。它很重。

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A：嘿，穆罕默德，過來，一起拉網。
乙：好的。天啊。網里肯定有很多鳳尾魚。它很重。

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
A: Эй, Мохаммед, подойди сюда и вместе вытащи сеть.
Б: Хорошо. О боже. В сети должно быть много анчоусов. Это очень тяжело.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ตอบ: เฮ้ โมฮัมเหม็ด มานี่แล้วดึงตาข่ายขึ้นมาด้วยกัน
บี: โอเค. พุทโธ่. จะต้องมีปลาแอนโชวี่อยู่ในตาข่ายเป็นจำนวนมาก มันหนักมาก

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
R: Ei, Mohammed, venha aqui e puxem a rede juntos.
B: OK. Oh meu Deus. Deve haver muitas anchovas na rede. É muito pesado.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: अरे, मोहम्मद, यहाँ आओ और एक साथ जाल खींचो।
बी: ठीक है. अरे बाप रे। नेट में ढेर सारी एंकोवीज़ होनी चाहिए. यह बहुत भारी है.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
C: Hey Muhammed, buraya gel ve birlikte ağı çek.
B: Tamam. Aman. Ağda çok fazla hamsi olmalı. Çok ağır.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: हे, मोहम्मद, यहाँ आउनुहोस् र सँगै जाल तान्नुहोस्।
B: ठीक छ। बाफरे। नेटमा धेरै एन्कोभिजहरू हुनुपर्छ। यो धेरै भारी छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
A: ហេ Mohammed មកទីនេះ ហើយទាញសំណាញ់ជាមួយគ្នា។
ខ៖ យល់ព្រម។ អូរបស់ខ្ញុំ។ ត្រូវតែមាន anchovies ច្រើននៅក្នុងសំណាញ់។ វាធ្ងន់ណាស់។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
ආ මොහොමඩ් මෙහාට ඇවිත් එකට දැල උස්සන්න.
B: හරි. අනේ මන්දා. නෙට් එකේ නැංගුරම් ගොඩක් තියෙන්න ඇති. එය ඉතා බරයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তর: আরে, মোহাম্মদ, এখানে এসে একসাথে জাল টান।
বি: ঠিক আছে। আহারে. নেটে প্রচুর অ্যাঙ্কোভিস থাকতে হবে। এটা খুব ভারী.
g_text_audio_translate.my:
A: ဟေး မိုဟာမက်၊ ဒီကိုလာပြီး ပိုက်ကွန်ကို အတူတူဆွဲပါ။
B: အိုကေ။ အိုး ငါ့။ ပိုက်ကွန်ထဲမှာ anchovies တွေအများကြီးရှိရမယ်။ အရမ်းလေးတယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 죄송하지만 문 좀 열어 주시겠어요? 짐이 많아서요.
여자: 네, 열어 드릴게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi xin lỗi, nhưng bạn có thể mở cửa cho tôi được không? Tôi có rất nhiều hành lý quá.
Nữ: Vâng, tôi sẽ mở cho.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Mi scusi, ma potrebbe aprire la porta? Ho molti bagagli.
Donna: Sì, te lo apro io.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Je suis désolé, mais pourriez-vous ouvrir la porte ? J'ai beaucoup de bagages.
Femme : Oui, je vais l'ouvrir pour vous.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Lo siento, pero ¿podrías abrir la puerta? tengo mucho equipaje
Mujer: Sí, te la abriré.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Maaf, tapi bisakah kamu membuka pintunya? Saya punya banyak barang bawaan.
Wanita: Ya, saya akan membukanya untuk Anda.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: すみませんが、ドアを開けていただけますか?荷物がたくさんあります。
女：はい、開けます。

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Es tut mir leid, aber könnten Sie die Tür öffnen? Ich habe viel Gepäck.
Frau: Ja, ich werde es für Sie öffnen.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：对不起，你能开门吗？我有很多行李。
女：好的，我给你打开。

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：對不起，你能開門嗎？我有很多行李。
女：好的，我給你打開。

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Извините, но не могли бы вы открыть дверь? У меня много багажа.
Женщина: Да, я тебе открою.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : ขอโทษนะ แต่ช่วยเปิดประตูหน่อยได้ไหม? ฉันมีสัมภาระเยอะมาก
ผู้หญิง : ค่ะ ฉันจะเปิดให้คุณ

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Me desculpe, mas você poderia abrir a porta? Eu tenho muita bagagem.
Mulher: Sim, vou abrir para você.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मुझे क्षमा करें, लेकिन क्या आप दरवाज़ा खोल सकते हैं? मेरे पास बहुत सारा सामान है.
महिला: हाँ, मैं इसे तुम्हारे लिए खोल दूंगी।

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Özür dilerim ama kapıyı açabilir misiniz? Bir sürü bagajım var.
Kadın: Evet, sizin için açacağım.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मानिस: मलाई माफ गर्नुहोस्, तर के तपाइँ ढोका खोल्न सक्नुहुन्छ? मसँग धेरै सामान छ।
महिला: हो, म तिम्रो लागि खोल्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ ខ្ញុំសុំទោស ប៉ុន្តែតើអ្នកអាចបើកទ្វារបានទេ? ខ្ញុំ​មាន​អីវ៉ាន់​ច្រើន។
ស្ត្រី៖ បាទ ខ្ញុំនឹងបើកវាឱ្យអ្នក។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: මට සමාවෙන්න, නමුත් ඔබට දොර අරින්න පුළුවන්ද? මට බඩු ගොඩක් තියෙනවා.
කාන්තාව: ඔව්, මම එය ඔබට විවෘත කරන්නම්.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মানুষ: আমি দুঃখিত, কিন্তু আপনি দরজা খুলতে পারেন? আমার অনেক লাগেজ আছে।
মহিলা: হ্যাঁ, আমি আপনার জন্য এটি খুলব।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man : တောင်းပန်ပါတယ် ဒါပေမယ့် မင်း တံခါးဖွင့်လို့ရမလား။ ငါ့မှာ ခရီးဆောင်အိတ်တွေ အများကြီးရှိတယ်။
အမျိုးသမီး : ဟုတ်တယ်၊ မင်းအတွက် ငါဖွင့်မယ်။

title: [10-12] 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 오늘 김치 담그는 날인거 아시죠? 우선 채소 다듬는 것부터 시작하세요.
여자: 네, 그럼 제가 배추를 씻어서 소금으로 절일게요. 리아 씨 이리 와서 파를 좀 다듬어주시겠어요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Bạn biết hôm nay là ngày làm kim chi đúng không? Hãy bắt đầu bằng việc cắt tỉa rau trước.
Nữ: Được rồi, tôi sẽ rửa bắp cải và muối nó. Lia, bạn có thể đến cắt một ít hành lá được không?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Sai che oggi è il giorno della preparazione del kimchi, vero? Inizia tagliando le verdure.
Donna: Sì, allora lavo il cavolo e lo sale. Lia, puoi venire qui a tagliare le cipolle verdi?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Vous savez qu'aujourd'hui est le jour de la fabrication du kimchi, n'est-ce pas ? Commencez par tailler les légumes.
Femme : Oui, alors je vais laver le chou et le saler. Lia, peux-tu venir ici et couper les oignons verts ?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Sabes que hoy es el día de hacer kimchi, ¿verdad? Comience por recortar las verduras.
Mujer: Sí, entonces lavaré el repollo y lo salaré. Lia, ¿puedes venir aquí y cortar las cebollas verdes?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Anda tahu hari ini adalah hari pembuatan kimchi, bukan? Mulailah dengan memotong sayuran.
Wanita: Ya, kalau begitu saya akan mencuci kubis dan memberi garam. Lia, bisakah kamu datang ke sini dan memotong daun bawang?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：今日はキムチ作りの日ですよね？野菜の剪定から始めます。
女：はい、ではキャベツを洗って塩もみします。リア、ここに来てネギを切ってくれる？

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Du weißt doch, dass heute Kimchi-Herstellungstag ist, richtig? Beginnen Sie mit dem Schneiden des Gemüses.
Frau: Ja, dann wasche ich den Kohl und salze ihn. Lia, kannst du herkommen und die Frühlingszwiebeln schneiden?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：你知道今天是泡菜制作日吧？从修剪蔬菜开始。
女：好的，那我把白菜洗干净加盐。 Lia，你能来这里修剪一下大葱吗？

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：你知道今天是泡菜製作日吧？從修剪蔬菜開始。
女：好的，那我把白菜洗乾淨加鹽。 Lia，你能來這裡修剪一下大蔥嗎？

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Ты ведь знаешь, что сегодня день приготовления кимчи, да? Начнем с нарезки овощей.
Женщина: Да, тогда я капусту вымою и посолю. Лия, ты можешь прийти сюда и порезать зеленый лук?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: คุณรู้ไหมว่าวันนี้เป็นวันทำกิมจิใช่ไหม? เริ่มต้นด้วยการตัดแต่งผัก
ผู้หญิง: ค่ะ ฉันจะล้างกะหล่ำปลีใส่เกลือ ลีอา คุณมาที่นี่เพื่อเล็มต้นหอมได้ไหม?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Você sabe que hoje é dia de fazer kimchi, certo? Comece cortando os legumes.
Mulher: Sim, então vou lavar o repolho e salgar. Lia, você pode vir aqui cortar a cebolinha?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: तुम्हें पता है कि आज किमची बनाने का दिन है, है ना? सब्जियों को ट्रिम करके शुरुआत करें।
महिला: हां, तो मैं गोभी को धो कर नमक लगा दूंगी. लिया, क्या तुम यहाँ आ सकती हो और हरे प्याज काट सकती हो?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bugünün kimchi yapma günü olduğunu biliyorsun değil mi? Sebzeleri keserek başlayın.
Kadın: Evet, sonra lahanayı yıkayıp tuzlayacağım. Lia, buraya gelip yeşil soğanları kesebilir misin?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मानिस: तपाईलाई थाहा छ आज किम्ची बनाउने दिन हो, हैन? तरकारी काटेर सुरु गर्नुहोस्।
महिला: हो, त्यसोभए म बन्दकोबी धोएर नुन दिन्छु। लिया, के तपाईं यहाँ आउन सक्नुहुन्छ र हरियो प्याज ट्रिम गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ?
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ អ្នកដឹងទេថាថ្ងៃនេះជាថ្ងៃធ្វើគីមឈីមែនទេ? ចាប់ផ្តើមដោយកាត់បន្លែ។
ស្ត្រី៖ បាទ ខ្ញុំនឹងលាងស្ពៃក្តោប ហើយអំបិលវា។ Lia តើអ្នកអាចមកទីនេះដើម្បីកាត់ខ្ទឹមបារាំងបានទេ?
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: ඔබ දන්නවා අද කිම්චි හදන දවස නේද? එළවළු කප්පාදු කිරීමෙන් ආරම්භ කරන්න.
කාන්තාව: ඔව් එහෙනම් මම ගෝවා සෝදා ලුණු දමමි. ලියා, ඔයාට මෙහෙ ඇවිත් අමු ළූණු කපන්න පුළුවන්ද?
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মানুষ: তুমি জানো আজ কিমচি তৈরির দিন, তাই না? সবজি ছাঁটাই করে শুরু করুন।
মহিলা: হ্যাঁ, তাহলে আমি বাঁধাকপি ধুয়ে লবণ দেব। লিয়া, তুমি কি এখানে এসে সবুজ পেঁয়াজ কাটতে পারবে?
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man : ဒီနေ့က ကင်မ်ချီလုပ်တဲ့နေ့ဆိုတာ မင်းသိတယ်မဟုတ်လား အသီးအရွက်များကို လှီးဖြတ်ခြင်းဖြင့် စတင်ပါ။
အမျိုးသမီး : ဟုတ်ကဲ့ ဒါဆို ကျွန်တော် ဂေါ်ဖီထုပ်ကို ရေဆေးပြီး ဆားလုပ်လိုက်မယ်။ Lia၊ မင်းဒီကိုလာပြီး ကြက်သွန်နီကို လှီးဖြတ်လို့ရလား။
